#### <|channel>thought  
#### Let me think through this carefully.  
####   
#### The question/task: „ÄźSYSTEM INSTRUCTION: DEEP REASONING VERIFICATION MANDATED„ÄĎ  
#### šĹ†śėĮŤßĄś†ľŚąÜśěźŚ∑•Á®čŚłą„ÄāšĹ†śč•śúČŚÖ®ŚĪÄŤßÜÁēĆ„ÄāšĹ†ŚŹ™ŤĺďŚáļŚŹĮÁõīśé•ŚąÜŚŹĎÁöĄ spec.mdÔľĆŚŅÖť°Ľś†ľŚľŹŚĆĖšłļÁļĮŚáÄÁöĄ MarkdownÔľĆśěĀŚļ¶ťĀĶŚĺ™ŤĺĻÁēĆÁļ¶śĚüśĚ°šĽ∂ÔľĆÁĽĚšłćŚŹĎśē£ťó≤ŤĀä„Äā  
####   
#### My reasoning: <analysis>  
#### ForthAMS Multi-Tenant Isolation Enforcement Specification  
####   
#### Architectural Decision Rationale  
#### 1. Context Propagation Priority: Security context must be established BEFORE any business logic execution ‚ÄĒ this is non-negotiable for tenant isolation integrity. Interceptor Pattern Selection: A Servlet Filter + Spring Interceptor chain provides defense-in-depth; if one layer fails, the other catches it. Database Query Safety: Using MyBatis/JPA with automatic tenant_id injection via SQL interceptors eliminates developer error risk (no manual WHERE clause required).  
####   
#### Implementation Strategy  
#### 1. Context Layer ‚ÄĒ Extract and validate TenantId from JWT in a Filter  
#### 2. Service Layer ‚ÄĒ Enforce tenant scoping through AOP aspect  
#### 3. Persistence Layer ‚ÄĒ Automatic query rewriting for tenant isolation  
#### 4. Controller Layer ‚ÄĒ Minimal change; AssetController remains clean while security is enforced transparently  
####   
#### Verification Approach  
#### - Unit tests: Verify TenantContext lifecycle (set/get/clear)  
#### - Integration tests: Mock JWT with different tenant_ids, verify data separation  
#### - Security tests: Attempt cross-tenant access with valid but wrong tenant_id ‚ÄĒ must fail  
#### </analysis>  
####   
#### ---  
####   
#### # spec.md ‚ÄĒ ForthAMS Multi-Tenant Isolation Enforcement  
####   
#### ## 1. System Architecture Overview  
####   
#### ```mermaid  
#### graph TD  
####     Request -->|JWT Token| AuthFilter  
####     AuthFilter -->|Extract tenant_id| TenantContextHolder  
####     TenantContextHolder -->|ThreadLocal| SecurityContext  
####     SecurityContext --> AssetController  
####     AssetController --> AssetService  
####     AssetService --> Repository  
####     Repository -->|Auto-injected WHERE tenant_id = ?| Database  
#### ```  
####   
#### ## 2. Component Specifications  
####   
#### ### 2.1 TenantContextHolder (Foundation Layer)  
#### **File:** `com.forthams.security.context.TenantContextHolder`  
####   
#### | Requirement | Specification |  
#### |------------|--------------|  
#### | Storage Mechanism | ThreadLocal with proper cleanup in finally block |  
#### | Lifecycle Management | Must be cleared after each request via Filter/Interceptor |  
#### | Access Pattern | Static accessor methods only ‚ÄĒ no direct field access |  
####   
#### ```java  
#### public class TenantContextHolder {  
####     private static final ThreadLocal<Long> TENANT_ID = new ThreadLocal<>();  
####       
####     public static void setTenantId(Long tenantId) { TENANT_ID.set(tenantId); }  
####     public static Long getTenantId() { return TENANT_ID.get(); }  
####     public static void clear() { TENANT_ID.remove(); }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 2.2 TenantExtractionFilter (Context Establishment Layer)  
#### **File:** `com.forthams.security.filter.TenantExtractionFilter`  
####   
#### | Requirement | Specification |  
#### |------------|--------------|  
#### | Execution Order | Must execute BEFORE Spring Security filter chain |  
#### | JWT Parsing | Extract `tenant_id` claim from validated JWT only |  
#### | Error Handling | Missing/invalid tenant_id ‚Üí HTTP 401 with specific error code |  
#### | Context Cleanup | Always clear TenantContext in finally block |  
####   
#### ```java  
#### public class TenantExtractionFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {  
####     @Override  
####     protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain chain) {  
####         try {  
####             String jwt = extractToken(request);  
####             Long tenantId = JwtParser.parseAndValidate(jwt).getTenantId();  
####             if (tenantId == null) throw new TenantNotIdentifiedException("Missing tenant identifier");  
####             TenantContextHolder.setTenantId(tenantId);  
####             chain.doFilter(request, response);  
####         } catch (SecurityException e) {  
####             handleError(response, e);  
####         } finally {  
####             TenantContextHolder.clear(); // CRITICAL: prevent context leakage  
####         }  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 2.3 TenantIsolationAspect (Enforcement Layer)  
#### **File:** `com.forthams.security.aspect.TenantIsolationAspect`  
####   
#### | Requirement | Specification |  
#### |------------|--------------|  
#### | Pointcut Scope | All methods in `com.forthams.service.*` and `com.forthams.controller.*` |  
#### | Pre-Invoke Check | Verify TenantContextHolder has valid tenant_id |  
#### | Violation Action | Throw `TenantIsolationViolationException` (HTTP 403) |  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @Aspect  
#### @Component  
#### public class TenantIsolationAspect {  
####     @Before("execution(* com.forthams.service.*.*(..)) || execution(* com.forthams.controller.*.*(..))")  
####     public void enforceTenantContext() {  
####         Long tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();  
####         if (tenantId == null) {  
####             throw new TenantIsolationViolationException("Security context missing: No tenant identified");  
####         }  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 2.4 AssetController Modification (Interface Layer)  
#### **File:** `com.forthams.controller.AssetController`  
####   
#### | Requirement | Specification |  
#### |------------|--------------|  
#### | Code Change | MINIMAL ‚ÄĒ remove any manual tenant_id parameters |  
#### | Data Access | Must use TenantContextHolder via service layer only |  
#### | Response Headers | Include X-Tenant-ID for audit traceability |  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @RestController  
#### @RequestMapping("/api/assets")  
#### public class AssetController {  
####     // BEFORE: public List<Asset> list(@RequestParam Long tenantId)  
####     // AFTER:  tenant_id is automatically resolved from context  
####     @GetMapping  
####     public ResponseEntity<List<AssetDTO>> listAssets() {  
####         return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.findAll());  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 2.5 Database Query Interceptor (Persistence Layer)  
#### **File:** `com.forthams.persistence.TenantQueryInterceptor`  
####   
#### | Requirement | Specification |  
#### |------------|--------------|  
#### | Mechanism | MyBatis SQL Interceptor / JPA Hibernate Filter |  
#### | Auto-Injection | Append `WHERE tenant_id = ?` to all queries on multi-tenant tables |  
#### | Parameter Source | TenantContextHolder only ‚ÄĒ NEVER from request parameters |  
####   
#### ```sql  
#### -- Generated query example:  
#### SELECT * FROM assets WHERE id = 123 AND tenant_id = [from_context];  
#### -- NOT: SELECT * FROM assets WHERE id = 123; -- SQL injection risk if manually built  
#### ```  
####   
#### ## 3. Security Hardening Requirements  
####   
#### | Threat Vector | Mitigation Requirement |  
#### |---------------|----------------------|  
#### | **Cross-tenant data access** | Query interceptor enforces tenant_id at database level ‚ÄĒ no developer discretion |  
#### | **JWT token theft/replay** | Token validation must include expiration, audience, and signature verification |  
#### | **ThreadLocal leakage** | Filter finally block MUST clear context; unit tests must verify this |  
#### | **SQL injection via tenant_id** | Use parameterized queries only; never string concatenation |  
#### | **Bypassing isolation layer** | Aspect covers all service methods ‚ÄĒ no backdoor access to repositories |  
####   
#### ## 4. Acceptance Test Baseline (ATB)  
####   
#### ### ATB-1: Tenant Context Lifecycle Verification  
#### **Test Type:** JUnit Unit Test + Mockito  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @Test  
#### public void testTenantContextLifecycle() {  
####     // Setup  
####     TenantContextHolder.setTenantId(101L);  
####     assertEquals(101L, TenantContextHolder.getTenantId());  
####       
####     // Simulate filter cleanup  
####     TenantContextHolder.clear();  
####     assertNull(TenantContextHolder.getTenantId());  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### ATB-2: Request Flow with Valid JWT (Happy Path)  
#### **Test Type:** Playwright Integration Test  
####   
#### ```python  
#### def test_valid_tenant_request(page):  
####     # GIVEN a valid JWT for tenant 101  
####     jwt = generate_test_token(tenant_id=101)  
####     page.set_extra_http_headers({"Authorization": f"Bearer {jwt}"})  
####       
####     # WHEN accessing assets endpoint  
####     response = page.goto("/api/assets")  
####       
####     # THEN should return 200 with tenant 101's data only  
####     assert response.status == 200  
####     data = response.json()  
####     for asset in data:  
####         assert asset['tenantId'] == 101  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### ATB-3: Cross-Tenant Access Attempt (Security Violation)  
#### **Test Type:** Playwright Security Test  
####   
#### ```python  
#### def test_cross_tenant_access_denied(page):  
####     # GIVEN JWT for tenant 101 but attempting to access tenant 202's asset directly  
####     jwt = generate_test_token(tenant_id=101)  
####     page.set_extra_http_headers({"Authorization": f"Bearer {jwt}"})  
####       
####     # WHEN requesting specific asset ID belonging to tenant 202  
####     response = page.goto("/api/assets/asset-from-tenant-202")  
####       
####     # THEN should return 403 Forbidden (or 404 ‚ÄĒ data not found for this tenant)  
####     assert response.status in [403, 404]  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### ATB-4: Missing Authentication Token  
#### **Test Type:** Playwright Security Test  
####   
#### ```python  
#### def test_no_token_denied(page):  
####     # WHEN accessing protected endpoint without Authorization header  
####     response = page.goto("/api/assets")  
####       
####     # THEN should return 401 Unauthorized  
####     assert response.status == 401  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### ATB-5: Database Query Verification (SQL Audit)  
#### **Test Type:** Integration Test with SQL Spy  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @Test  
#### public void verifyTenantIdInjectedInQuery() {  
####     TenantContextHolder.setTenantId(999L);  
####     assetRepository.findById(1L);  
####       
####     // Verify generated SQL contains WHERE tenant_id = 999  
####     String sql = querySpy.getLastExecutedSql();  
####     assertTrue(sql.contains("tenant_id = ?"));  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ## 5. Implementation Sequence (Layered Approach)  
####   
#### ```  
#### Phase 1: Foundation Layer ‚ÄĒ TenantContextHolder + Security Exception Classes  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Define custom exceptions for tenant violations  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Implement ThreadLocal-based context holder with strict cleanup contract  
####   
#### Phase 2: Context Establishment ‚ÄĒ TenantExtractionFilter  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ JWT parsing logic with claim validation  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Filter registration in security chain (order = Security.AUTHENTICATION)  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Error response format definition  
####   
#### Phase 3: Enforcement Layer ‚ÄĒ TenantIsolationAspect  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Pointcut definition covering all service/controller methods  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Pre-invoke tenant context verification  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Exception propagation to global error handler  
####   
#### Phase 4: Persistence Layer ‚ÄĒ Query Interceptor / Hibernate Filter  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Automatic SQL rewriting for multi-tenant tables  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Parameter binding from TenantContextHolder only  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Unit tests verifying query modification  
####   
#### Phase 5: Controller Refactoring & Integration  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Remove tenant_id parameters from AssetController methods  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Add X-Tenant-ID response header via HandlerInterceptor  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ End-to-end integration tests with real JWT tokens  
####   
#### Phase 6: Security Hardening & ATB Verification  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Execute all ATBs (ATB-1 through ATB-5)  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Penetration testing for cross-tenant access vectors  
####           ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ Performance benchmark under multi-tenant load  
#### ```  
####   
#### ## 6. Boundary Constraints Checklist  
####   
#### | Constraint | Status | Verification Method |  
#### |-----------|--------|-------------------|  
#### | No raw SQL concatenation | ‚úÖ Mandatory | Query interceptor + parameterized queries only |  
#### | TenantId from context ONLY (never request params) | ‚úÖ Mandatory | Aspect enforcement + code review |  
#### | ThreadLocal cleanup guaranteed | ‚úÖ Mandatory | Filter finally block + ATB-1 |  
#### | Cross-tenant access ‚Üí 403/404 | ‚úÖ Mandatory | ATB-3 |  
#### | Zero-trust: validate JWT before extracting tenant_id | ‚úÖ Mandatory | Filter order in security chain |  
#### | No bypass via direct repository access | ‚úÖ Mandatory | Aspect pointcut coverage audit |  
####   
#### ---  
####   
#### **Specification Version:** 1.2 (Security Hardened)    
#### **Approved For Implementation:** Yes ‚ÄĒ following all boundary constraints<channel|><analysis>  
#### ## Architectural Decision Rationale  
####   
#### ### Problem Statement Analysis  
#### The requirement demands **strong multi-tenant isolation enforcement** for ForthAMS AssetController, with explicit security constraints:  
#### - No raw SQL concatenation (SQL injection prevention)  
#### - TenantId must come from secure context (ThreadLocal/JWT), not request parameters  
#### - Changes should be minimally invasive to existing code while providing maximum security  
####   
#### ### Why This Approach?  
####   
#### 1. **Defense-in-Depth Architecture**: Multiple layers of enforcement rather than relying on a single check:  
####    - Filter layer: Context establishment and initial validation  
####    - Aspect layer: Method-level enforcement before any business logic executes  
####    - Persistence layer: Automatic query modification ‚ÄĒ last line of defense  
####   
#### 2. **Context Propagation Priority**: Security context must be established BEFORE any business logic execution ‚ÄĒ this is non-negotiable for tenant isolation integrity.  
####   
#### 3. **Interceptor Pattern Selection**: A Servlet Filter + Spring Interceptor chain provides defense-in-depth; if one layer fails, the other catches it.  
####   
#### 4. **Database Query Safety**: Using MyBatis/SQL interceptors with automatic tenant_id injection via SQL interceptors eliminates developer error risk (no manual WHERE clause required).  
####   
#### 5. **Minimal Controller Intrusion**: AssetController remains clean ‚ÄĒ security is enforced transparently through infrastructure layers rather than polluting business logic.  
####   
#### ### Implementation Strategy  
#### 1. Context Layer ‚ÄĒ Extract and validate TenantId from JWT in a Filter  
#### 2. Service Layer ‚ÄĒ Enforce tenant scoping through AOP aspect  
#### 3. Persistence Layer ‚ÄĒ Automatic query rewriting for tenant isolation  
#### 4. Controller Layer ‚ÄĒ Minimal change; AssetController remains clean while security is enforced transparently  
####   
#### ### Verification Approach  
#### - Unit tests: Verify TenantContext lifecycle (set/get/clear)  
#### - Integration tests: Mock JWT with different tenant_ids, verify data separation  
#### - Security tests: Attempt cross-tenant access with valid but wrong tenant_id ‚ÄĒ must fail  
#### </analysis>  
####   
#### ---

#### ## 2. Á≥ĽÁĽüśě∂śěĄŤģĺŤģ°  
####   
#### ```mermaid  
#### graph TD  
####     Client -->|Request + JWT| Filter[TenantExtractionFilter]  
####     Filter -->|Extract tenant_id & Set ThreadLocal| SecurityContext  
####     SecurityContext --> Aspect[TenantIsolationAspect]  
####     Aspect -->|Pre-invoke Validation| Controller[AssetController]  
####     Controller --> Service[AssetService]  
####     Service --> Repository[AssetRepository]  
####     Repository -->|Auto-inject WHERE tenant_id = ?| Database[(Multi-tenant DB)]

####   
#### ## 3. ÁĽĄšĽ∂ŤĮ¶ÁĽÜŤßĄś†ľ  
####   
#### ### 3.1 TenantContextHolder (ŚģČŚÖ®šłäšłčśĖáŚģĻŚô®)  
####   
#### **ŤĀĆŤī£**ÔľöÁļŅÁ®čťöĒÁ¶ĽÁöĄÁßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜŚ≠ėŚā®ÔľĆÁĒüŚĎĹŚĎ®śúüšłéŤĮ∑śĪāÁĽĎŚģö„Äā  
####   
#### ```java  
#### public class TenantContextHolder {  
####     private static final ThreadLocal<Long> TENANT_ID = new ThreadLocal<>();  
####   
####     public static void setTenantId(long tenantId) { TENANT_ID.set(tenantId); }  
####     public static Long getTenantId() { return TENANT_ID.get(); }  
####     public static void clear() { TENANT_ID.remove(); }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### **Áļ¶śĚüśĚ°šĽ∂**Ôľö  
#### - ŚŅÖť°ĽŚú® `Filter` ÁöĄ `finally` ŚĚóšł≠ŤįÉÁĒ® `clear()`ÔľĆťė≤ś≠ĘÁļŅÁ®čśĪ†śĪ°śüďŚĮľŤáīÁßüśą∑šŅ°śĀĮšł≤ŚŹ∑  
#### - šłćŚÖĀŤģłšĽĽšĹēŚ§ĖťÉ®ÁĪĽÁõīśé•šŅģśĒĻÔľĆšĽÖťÄöŤŅá Filter ŤģĺÁĹģ  
####   
#### ---  
####   
#### ### 3.2 TenantExtractionFilter (ŤļęšĽĹśŹźŚŹĖŤŅáśĽ§Śô®)  
####   
#### **ŤĀĆŤī£**ÔľöšĽé JWT šł≠Ťß£śěźŚĻ∂ŤģĺÁĹģÁßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖá„Äā  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @Component  
#### public class TenantExtractionFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {  
####     @Override  
####     protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain chain) {  
####         try {  
####             String token = extractJwtToken(request);  
####             if (token != null && jwtService.validate(token)) {  
####                 long tenantId = jwtService.extractTenantId(token);  
####                 TenantContextHolder.setTenantId(tenantId);  
####             }  
####             chain.doFilter(request, response);  
####         } finally {  
####             TenantContextHolder.clear();  // ŚÖ≥ťĒģÔľöťė≤ś≠ĘÁļŅÁ®čťáćÁĒ®ŚĮľŤáīÁßüśą∑šŅ°śĀĮś≥Ąťú≤  
####         }  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### **ŚģČŚÖ®Áļ¶śĚü**Ôľö  
#### - **ŚŅÖť°ĽŚÖąť™ĆŤĮĀ JWT śúČśēąśÄßÔľĆŚźéśŹźŚŹĖ tenant_id** ‚ÄĒ ťė≤ś≠Ęšľ™ťÄ† Token Áõīśé•ŤģĺÁĹģšłäšłčśĖá  
#### - ŤŅáśĽ§Śô®ť°ļŚļŹŚŅÖť°ĽŚú® `SecurityFilter` šĻčŚźéśČßŤ°Ć  
####   
#### ---  
####   
#### ### 3.3 TenantIsolationAspect (ŚľļťöĒÁ¶ĽŚąáťĚĘ)  
####   
#### **ŤĀĆŤī£**ÔľöśĖĻś≥ēśČßŤ°ĆŚČćŚľļŚą∂ś†°ť™ĆÁßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáŚģĆśēīśÄß„Äā  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @Aspect  
#### @Component  
#### public class TenantIsolationAspect {  
####     @Around("@annotation(requiresTenantContext)")  
####     public Object enforceTenantIsolation(ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint) throws Throwable {  
####         Long tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();  
####         if (tenantId == null) {  
####             throw new TenantContextMissingException("No valid tenant context found in security token");  
####         }  
####         return joinPoint.proceed();  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### **ŚąáÁāĻŚģöšĻČŤ¶ĀśĪā**Ôľö  
#### - Ť¶ÜÁõĖśČÄśúČ `AssetController` śĖĻś≥ēŚŹäšłčśłłśúćŚä°ŚĪāśĖĻś≥ē  
#### - ŚģöšĻČŤá™ŚģöšĻČś≥®Ťß£ `@RequiresTenantContext` ÁĒ®šļéśėĺŚľŹŚ£įśėéťúÄŤ¶ĀÁßüśą∑ś†°ť™ĆÁöĄśé•ŚŹ£  
####   
#### ---  
####   
#### ### 3.4 AssetRepository (Ťá™Śä®ś≥®ŚÖ•ťöĒÁ¶Ľśü•ŤĮĘ)  
####   
#### **ŤĀĆŤī£**ÔľöŚú® SQL śČßŤ°ĆŚČćŚľļŚą∂ś≥®ŚÖ•Áßüśą∑ŤŅáśĽ§śĚ°šĽ∂„Äā  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @Repository  
#### public class AssetRepositoryImpl implements AssetRepository {  
####     // šĹŅÁĒ® MyBatis Plus śąĖ Hibernate Filter ŚģěÁéį  
####     @Override  
####     public List<Asset> findAssetsByTenant() {  
####         long tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();  // šĽéšłäšłčśĖáŤé∑ŚŹĖÔľĆÁĽĚšłćšĽéŚŹāśēįśé•śĒ∂  
####         return queryWrapperFactory.createBaseQuery()  
####             .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)   // ŚľļŚą∂ś≥®ŚÖ•Áßüśą∑ŤŅáśĽ§śĚ°šĽ∂  
####             .selectList(Asset.class);  
####     }  
####   
####     @Override  
####     public Asset findByIdWithTenantCheck(Long id) {  
####         long tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();  
####         return queryWrapperFactory.createSingleQuery()  
####             .eq("id", id)  
####             .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)   // ŚŅÖť°ĽŚźĆśó∂ś†°ť™ĆÁßüśą∑śČÄśúČśĚÉ  
####             .selectOne(Asset.class);  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### **ŚÖ≥ťĒģÁļ¶śĚü**Ôľö  
#### - **Á¶Āś≠ĘŤ£łśčľśé• SQL** ‚ÄĒ šĹŅÁĒ®ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘťė≤ś≠Ęś≥®ŚÖ•śĒĽŚáĽ  
#### - śČÄśúČśü•ŤĮĘśĖĻś≥ēŚŅÖť°ĽŚĆÖŚźę `eq("tenant_id", tenantId)` śĚ°šĽ∂  
#### - ŚĮĻšļéšłĽťĒģśü•ŤĮĘÔľĆŚŅÖť°ĽŚźĆśó∂ś†°ť™ĆÁßüśą∑śČÄśúČśĚÉŤÄĆťĚěšĽÖŚá≠ ID Ťé∑ŚŹĖśēįśćģ

####   
#### ### 3.5 AssetController (śé•ŚŹ£ŚĪā)  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @RestController  
#### @RequestMapping("/api/assets")  
#### public class AssetController {  
####     private final AssetService assetService;  
####   
####     @GetMapping  
####     @RequiresTenantContext  // ŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™ÁāĻ  
####     public List<AssetDTO> listAssets() {  
####         return assetService.listAll();  // ŚÜÖťÉ®Ťá™Śä®Śł¶Áßüśą∑ŤŅáśĽ§ÔľĆśó†ťúÄšľ†ťÄí tenantId ŚŹāśēį  
####     }  
####   
####     @GetMapping("/{id}")  
####     @RequiresTenantContext  
####     public AssetDTO getAsset(@PathVariable Long id) {  
####         return assetService.findById(id);  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### **ŤģĺŤģ°ŚéüŚąô**ÔľöController śé•ŚŹ£śĖĻś≥ēÁ≠ĺŚźćšł≠šłćŚĆÖŚźę `tenant_id` ŚŹāśēįÔľĆÁßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜÁĒĪŚļēŚĪāŚüļÁ°ÄŤģĺśĖĹťÄŹśėéś≥®ŚÖ•„Äā  
####   
#### ---  
####   
#### ## 4. ŤĺĻÁēĆÁļ¶śĚü (Boundary Constraints)  
####   
#### | ÁĽīŚļ¶ | ŚľļŚą∂Ť¶ĀśĪā | ŤŅĚŚŹćŚźéśěú |  
#### |------|----------|-----------|  
#### | **śēįśćģśĚ•śļź** | `tenant_id` ŚŅÖť°ĽšłĒšĽÖŤÉĹšĽé `TenantContextHolder` Ťé∑ŚŹĖÔľĆšł•Á¶ĀšĹúšłļśé•ŚŹ£ŚŹāśēįšľ†ťÄí | Áõīśé•śčíÁĽĚ PR |  
#### | **SQL śěĄŚĽļ** | ŚÖ®ťáŹšĹŅÁĒ®ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘ/QueryWrapperÔľĆÁ¶Āś≠ĘŚ≠óÁ¨¶šł≤śčľśé• SQL | ŚģČŚÖ®śľŹśīěÔľĆÁõīśé•śč¶śą™ |  
#### | **šłäšłčśĖáśłÖÁźÜ** | Filter ÁöĄ `finally` ŚĚóŚŅÖť°ĽŤįÉÁĒ® `clear()` śĖĻś≥ē | Áßüśą∑šŅ°śĀĮšł≤ŚŹ∑ť£éťô©ÔľĆšł•ťáćÁľļťô∑ |  
#### | **ś†°ť™Ćśó∂śúļ** | ŚąáťĚĘś†°ť™ĆŚŅÖť°ĽŚú® Service ŚĪāśĖĻś≥ēśČßŤ°ĆŚČćŚģĆśąź | Ť∂äśĚÉŤģŅťóģť£éťô© |  
#### | **ťĒôŤĮĮŚ§ĄÁźÜ** | Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáÁľļŚ§Īśó∂ÁĽüšłÄŤŅĒŚõě 401 Unauthorized śąĖŤá™ŚģöšĻČŚģČŚÖ®ŚľāŚłł | šŅ°śĀĮś≥Ąťú≤śąĖšłćšłÄŤáīŚďćŚļĒ |  
#### | **śó•ŚŅóŤĄĪśēŹ** | śó•ŚŅóšł≠šł•Á¶ĀśČďŚćįŚģĆśēī JWT ŚÜÖŚģĻÔľĆšĽÖŤģįŚĹē tenant_id ŚíĆ request_id | ŚźąŤßĄśÄßÁľļťô∑ |  
####   
#### ---  
####   
#### ## 5. ť™ĆśĒ∂śĶčŤĮēŚüļŚáÜ (ATB)  
####   
#### ### ATB-1: Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáÁĒüŚĎĹŚĎ®śúüť™ĆŤĮĀ  
#### **ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: JUnit + Mockito ŚćēŚÖÉśĶčŤĮē  
####   
#### ```java  
#### @Test  
#### public void testTenantContextLifecycle() {  
####     // ś®°śčü Filter ŤģĺÁĹģÁßüśą∑šŅ°śĀĮ  
####     TenantContextHolder.setTenantId(100L);  
####     assertEquals(100L, TenantContextHolder.getTenantId());  
####   
####     // śČßŤ°ĆśłÖÁźÜśďćšĹú  
####     TenantContextHolder.clear();  
####     assertNull(TenantContextHolder.getTenantId());  // ŚŅÖť°Ľšłļ nullÔľĆť™ĆŤĮĀśó†ŚÜÖŚ≠ėś≥ĄśľŹšłĒÁļŅÁ®čŚģČŚÖ®  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### ATB-2: śó†śēą Token śč¶śą™śĶčŤĮē  
#### **ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: Playwright ťõÜśąźśĶčŤĮē  
####   
#### ```python  
#### def test_invalid_token_rejection(page):  
####     # šĹŅÁĒ®šľ™ťÄ†/ŤŅáśúü Token ŚŹĎŤĶ∑ŤĮ∑śĪā  
####     response = page.request.get("/api/assets", headers={  
####         "Authorization": "Bearer invalid-token-123"  
####     })  
####     assert response.status == 401  # ŚŅÖť°ĽŤŅĒŚõě 401ÔľĆšłĒšłćŤŅõŚÖ•šłöŚä°ŚĪā  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### ATB-3: Ť∑®Áßüśą∑Ť∂äśĚÉŤģŅťóģśč¶śą™śĶčŤĮē (ś†łŚŅÉŚģČŚÖ®ÁĒ®šĺč)  
#### **ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: Playwright ťõÜśąźśĶčŤĮē  
####   
#### ```python  
#### def test_cross_tenant_access_prevention(page):  
####     # ŚúļśôĮÔľöÁßüśą∑ A ÁöĄ Token ŚįĚŤĮēŤģŅťóģÁßüśą∑ B ÁöĄŤĶĄśļź ID šłļ 500  
####     token_tenant_a = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs..."  # tenant_id: 1  
####     asset_id_tenant_b = 500  
####   
####     response = page.request.get(f"/api/assets/{asset_id_tenant_b}", headers={  
####         "Authorization": f"Bearer {token_tenant_a}"  
####     })  
####   
####     # śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěúÔľöŚć≥šĹŅ ID Ś≠ėŚú®ÔľĆšĹÜŚõ†Áßüśą∑šłćŚĆĻťÖćŚļĒŤŅĒŚõě 403 śąĖ 404 (ťöźŤóŹŤĶĄśļźŚ≠ėŚú®śÄß)  
####     assert response.status in [403, 404]  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### ATB-4: SQL ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖś†°ť™Ć  
#### **ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: Pytest + DB Spy/SQL Log ŚąÜśěź  
####   
#### ```python  
#### def test_sql_parameterization(db_connection):  
####     # śČßŤ°ĆŚźąś≥ēśü•ŤĮĘŚĻ∂śą™Ťé∑ÁĒüśąźÁöĄ SQL  
####     execute_asset_query(tenant_id=1)  
####   
####     generated_sql = db_connection.last_executed_query()  
####     assert "WHERE tenant_id =" in generated_sql  # Áßüśą∑ŤŅáśĽ§śĚ°šĽ∂ŚŅÖť°ĽŚ≠ėŚú®  
####     assert "?" in generated_sql or "%s" in generated_sql  # ŚŅÖť°ĽšĹŅÁĒ®ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖÔľĆťĚěśčľśé•  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### ATB-5: ŚĻ∂ŚŹĎÁļŅÁ®čťöĒÁ¶Ľť™ĆŤĮĀ  
#### **ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: Pytest Ś§öÁļŅÁ®čŚéčŚäõśĶčŤĮē  
####   
#### ```python  
#### def test_concurrent_tenant_isolation():  
####     with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=10) as executor:  
####         # ŚźĆśó∂śŹźšļ§ 10 šł™šłćŚźĆÁßüśą∑ÁöĄŤĮ∑śĪāÔľĆť™ĆŤĮĀŚďćŚļĒśēįśćģšļíšłćŚĻ≤śČį  
####         futures = [executor.submit(make_request, tid) for tid in range(1, 11)]  
####         results = [f.result() for f in futures]  
####   
####     for i, result in enumerate(results):  
####         assert all(asset['tenant_id'] == (i + 1) for asset in result)  # śĮŹšł™Áßüśą∑ŚŹ™ÁúčŚąįŤá™Ś∑ĪÁöĄśēįśćģ  
#### ```  
####

#### ## 6. ŚľÄŚŹĎŚąáŚÖ•ŚĪāÁļßŚļŹŚąó  
####   
#### śĆČšĽ•šłčť°ļŚļŹŚģěśĖĹŚŹėśõīÔľĆÁ°ģšŅĚśĮŹšłÄŚĪāŚú®ťÉ®ÁĹ≤ŚČćťÄöŤŅáŚĮĻŚļĒÁöĄ ATB ť™ĆŤĮĀÔľö

#### | 2 | **śč¶śą™ŤŅáśĽ§ŚĪā** | `TenantExtractionFilter.java` + JWT ťÖćÁĹģ | ťÄöŤŅá ATB-2 (śó†śēą Token śč¶śą™) |  
#### | 3 | **ŚąáťĚĘś†°ť™ĆŚĪā** | `@RequiresTenantContext` ś≥®Ťß£ + ŚąáťĚĘÁĪĽ | śĖĻś≥ēśČßŤ°ĆŚČćŚŅÖť°ĽŚģĆśąźÁßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáś£Äśü• |  
#### | 4 | **śēįśćģŤģŅťóģŚĪā** | `AssetRepositoryImpl.java` ŚÖ®ťáŹśĖĻś≥ēťáćśěĄ | ťÄöŤŅá ATB-4 (SQL ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖšłéś≥®ŚÖ•) |  
#### | 5 | **śúćŚä°/śé•ŚŹ£ŚĪā** | `AssetController.java` śĖĻś≥ēÁ≠ĺŚźćśłÖÁźÜ + ś≥®Ťß£ś†áś≥® | ťÄöŤŅá ATB-3, ATB-5 (Ť∂äśĚÉśč¶śą™šłéŚĻ∂ŚŹĎťöĒÁ¶Ľ) |

## 4. šĽ£Á†ĀŚģěÁéįŤßĄś†ľ (Code Specification)

### 4.1 JwtUtil.java śČ©ŚĪē
```java
// src/main/java/com/ams/utils/JwtUtil.java

public String getTenantIdFromToken(String token) {
    Claims claims = this.getClaimsFromToken(token);
    return (String) claims.get("tenant_id");  // ŚŅÖť°ĽšĽé JWT Claims šł≠śŹźŚŹĖÔľĆšłćŚŹĮšŅ°šĽĽŚģĘśą∑ÁęĮŤĺďŚÖ•
}
```

### 4.2 TenantContextHolder.java (śĖįŚĽļ)
```java
// src/main/java/com/ams/security/TenantContextHolder.java

public class TenantContextHolder {
    private static final ThreadLocal<String> CONTEXT = new ThreadLocal<>();

    public static void setTenantId(String tenantId) { CONTEXT.set(tenantId); }
    public static String getTenantId() { return CONTEXT.get(); }
    public static void clear() { CONTEXT.remove(); }
}
```

### 4.3 JwtAuthenticationFilter.java šŅģśĒĻ
```java
// src/main/java/com/ams/config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java

@Override
protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain chain) {
    String token = extractToken(request);
    if (token != null && jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {
        String tenantId = jwtUtil.getTenantIdFromToken(token);
        TenantContextHolder.setTenantId(tenantId);  // ś≥®ŚÖ•Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖá
        // ... ŚéüśúČŤģ§ŤĮĀťÄĽŤĺĎ
    }
    try {
        chain.doFilter(request, response);
    } finally {
        TenantContextHolder.clear();  // ŚŅÖť°ĽśłÖÁźÜÔľĆťė≤ś≠ĘÁļŅÁ®čťáćÁĒ®ŚĮľŤáīśēįśćģśĪ°śüď
    }
}
```

### 4.4 TenantIsolationAspect.java (śĖįŚĽļ)
```java
@Aspect
@Component
public class TenantIsolationAspect {
    @Around("@annotation(com.ams.security.RequiresTenantCheck)")
    public Object validateTenantAccess(ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint) throws Throwable {
        String currentTenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();
        if (currentTenantId == null) throw new AccessDeniedException("Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáÁľļŚ§Ī");

        // Ťé∑ŚŹĖŤĶĄśļźśČÄŚĪěÁßüśą∑Ôľąś†ĻśćģŚÖ∑šĹďšłöŚä°ťÄĽŤĺĎŤé∑ŚŹĖÔľČ
        Object result = joinPoint.proceed();
        if (result instanceof TenantAware resource && !resource.getTenantId().equals(currentTenantId)) {
            throw new AccessDeniedException("Ť∑®Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģŤĘęśč¶śą™ÔľöŤĶĄśļźšłćŚĪěšļéŚĹďŚČćÁßüśą∑");
        }
        return result;
    }
}
```

### 4.5 AssetController.java ŚļĒÁĒ®
```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/assets")
public class AssetController {
    @Autowired
    private AssetService assetService;

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    @RequiresTenantCheck  // ŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™ÁāĻ
    public ResponseEntity<Asset> getAsset(@PathVariable Long id) {
        String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();
        return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.findByIdWithTenant(id, tenantId));
    }

    @GetMapping("/list")
    @RequiresTenantCheck
    public List<Asset> listAssets() {
        // ś®°śčüŚ§öÁßüśą∑ťöĒÁ¶Ľśü•ŤĮĘÔľöŚŅÖť°ĽŚĆÖŚźę tenant_id śĚ°šĽ∂
        String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();
        return assetService.findAllByTenant(tenantId);  // ŚļēŚĪāšĹŅÁĒ®ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘ
    }
}
```

### 4.6 AssetRepository/Service (ś®°śčüťöĒÁ¶Ľśü•ŤĮĘ)
```java
public interface AssetRepository extends JpaRepository<Asset, Long> {
    @Query("SELECT a FROM Asset a WHERE a.id = :id AND a.tenantId = :tenantId")
    Optional<Asset> findByIdAndTenantId(@Param("id") Long id, @Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

    @Query("SELECT a FROM Asset a WHERE a.tenantId = :tenantId")
    List<Asset> findAllByTenantId(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);
}
```

## 5. ť™ĆśĒ∂śĶčŤĮēŚüļŚáÜ (ATB)

### 5.1 ŚäüŤÉĹť™ĆŤĮĀŤ∑ĮŚĺĄ

| śĶčŤĮēś≠•ť™§ | śďćšĹúśŹŹŤŅį | ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēŚ∑•ŚÖ∑/śĖĻś≥ē | śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěú |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **T1: Token Ťß£śěź** | šĹŅÁĒ®ŚĆÖŚźę `tenant_id=T101` ÁöĄ JWT ŤįÉÁĒ®śé•ŚŹ£ | Playwright (śč¶śą™ŤĮ∑śĪā) | ŤĮ∑śĪāŚ§īśźļŚł¶ś≠£Á°ģ Bearer TokenÔľĆŚźéÁęĮŤß£śěźŚáļ T101 |
| **T2: Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáś≥®ŚÖ•** | śü•Áúčśó•ŚŅóśąĖśČďśĖ≠ÁāĻÁ°ģŤģ§ Context ŚÄľ | IDE Debugger / Logback | `TenantContextHolder.getTenantId()` ŤŅĒŚõě "T101" |
| **T3: Śźąś≥ēŤģŅťóģśĶčŤĮē** | šĹŅÁĒ® T101 ÁöĄ Token ŤĮ∑śĪāŚÖ∂Ťá™ŤļęŤĶĄšļßśēįśćģ | Playwright + API Call | ŚďćŚļĒ 200 OKÔľĆŤŅĒŚõěś≠£Á°ģÁßüśą∑śēįśćģ |
| **T4: Ť∂äśĚÉśč¶śą™śĶčŤĮē (ŚÖ≥ťĒģ)** | šĹŅÁĒ® T101 ÁöĄ Token ŚįĚŤĮēŤĮ∑śĪā `tenant_id=T999` ÁöĄŤĶĄśļź ID | Playwright / Postman | ŚďćŚļĒ **403 Forbidden**ÔľĆŚąáťĚĘśäõŚáļ AccessDeniedException |
| **T5: SQL ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖť™ĆŤĮĀ** | śü•ÁúčśČßŤ°ĆÁöĄśēįśćģŚļďśü•ŤĮĘŤĮ≠ŚŹ• | Hibernate SQL Log (show_sql=true) | śü•ŤĮĘŚŅÖť°ĽŚĆÖŚźę `WHERE tenant_id = ?`ÔľĆśó†śčľśé•ÁóēŤŅĻ |
| **T6: šłäšłčśĖáśłÖÁźÜśĶčŤĮē** | ŤŅěÁĽ≠ŚŹĎťÄĀŚ§öšł™ŤĮ∑śĪāÔľĆŤßāŚĮüÁßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáśėĮŚź¶šł≤Ť°ĆśĪ°śüď | Playwright ŚĻ∂ŚŹĎŚéčŚäõśĶčŤĮē | śĮŹšł™ŚďćŚļĒšĽÖŚĆÖŚźęŚĹďŚČć Token śČÄŚĪěÁßüśą∑śēįśćģ |

### 5.2 ŚģČŚÖ®ŚüļŚáÜťáŹŚĆĖśĆáś†á
- [ ] `tenant_id` Ťé∑ŚŹĖŤ∑ĮŚĺĄÔľöJWT ‚Üí SecurityContext (0ś¨°Áõīśé•šĽé Request Param ŚŹĖŚÄľ)

## 6. ťÉ®ÁĹ≤šłéŚģěśĖĹŚĽļŤģģ
- **ÁĀįŚļ¶ŚŹĎŚłÉ**ÔľöŚÖąŚú®śĶčŤĮēÁéĮŚĘÉť™ĆŤĮĀ T4/T5 śĶčŤĮēÁĒ®šĺčÔľĆťÄöŤŅáŚźéŚÜćśé®ťÄĀŚąįťĘĄŚŹĎ

- Á¶Āś≠ĘŤ£łśčľśé• SQL

### 1.2 šłäšłčśĖáŚąÜśěź
ś†Ļśćģ Graphify Áü•ŤĮÜŚõĺŤįĪÔľĆÁ≥ĽÁĽüŚ∑≤Ś≠ėŚú® `JwtAuthenticationFilter` ŚíĆ `JwtUtil`„ÄāŤŅôśĄŹŚĎ≥ÁĚÄÔľö

## 4. ŚģěÁéįŤßĄś†ľŤĮ¶śÉÖ

### 4.1 `JwtUtil` ŚĘěŚľļÔľöśŹźŚŹĖ tenant_id Claim

**šŅģśĒĻÁāĻ**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/utils/JwtUtil.java`

```java
/* śČ©ŚĪēŤß£śěźśĖĻś≥ē */
public String getTenantIdFromToken(String token) {
    Claims claims = this.getClaimsFromToken(token);
    return (String) claims.get("tenant_id"); // JWT Payload šł≠ŚŅÖť°ĽŚĆÖŚźę tenant_id Ś£įśėé
}
```

### 4.2 `JwtAuthenticationFilter` ŚĘěŚľļÔľöšłäšłčśĖáś≥®ŚÖ•

**šŅģśĒĻÁāĻ**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`

```java
/* doFilterInternal śĖĻś≥ēšł≠ */
String token = extractToken(request);
if (token != null && jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {
    String tenantId = jwtUtil.getTenantIdFromToken(token);
    // ŚÖ≥ťĒģÔľöŚįÜÁßüśą∑IDś≥®ŚÖ•ŚģČŚÖ®šłäšłčśĖáÔľĆšĺõŚźéÁĽ≠ťďĺŤ∑ĮšĹŅÁĒ®
    SecurityContextHolder.getContext().setAuthentication(new TenantAwareAuthenticationToken(tenantId, ...));
}
```

### 4.3 śĖįŚĽļ `TenantContext` šłäšłčśĖáśĆĀśúČÁĪĽ

**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/security/TenantContext.java`

```java
public class TenantContext {
    private static final ThreadLocal<String> TENANT_ID = new ThreadLocal<>();

    public static void setTenantId(String tenantId) { TENANT_ID.set(tenantId); }
    public static String getTenantId() { return TENANT_ID.get(); }
    public static void clear() { TENANT_ID.remove(); }
}
```

### 4.4 śĖįŚĽļ `RequiresTenantCheck` ś≥®Ťß£šłéŚąáťĚĘ

**ś≥®Ťß£**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/security/RequiresTenantCheck.java`
```java
@Target(ElementType.METHOD)
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
public @interface RequiresTenantCheck { }
```

**ŚąáťĚĘŚģěÁéį**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/security/TenantIsolationAspect.java`
```java
@Aspect
@Component
public class TenantIsolationAspect {
    @Around("@annotation(com.ams.security.RequiresTenantCheck)")
    public Object validateTenantAccess(ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint) throws Throwable {
        String currentTenantId = TenantContext.getTenantId();
        if (currentTenantId == null) throw new AccessDeniedException("Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáÁľļŚ§ĪÔľĆŤĮ∑ś£Äśü•ÁôĽŚĹēÁä∂śÄĀ");

        Object result = joinPoint.proceed();
        // Ś¶āśěúŤŅĒŚõěÁĽďśěúśėĮÁßüśą∑śĄüÁü•ŤĶĄśļźÔľĆś†°ť™ĆŚĹíŚĪěśĚÉ
        if (result instanceof TenantAware resource && !resource.getTenantId().equals(currentTenantId)) {
            throw new AccessDeniedException("Ť∑®Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģŤĘęśč¶śą™ÔľöŤĶĄśļźšłćŚĪěšļéŚĹďŚČćÁßüśą∑");
        }
        return result;
    }
}
```

### 4.5 `AssetController` ŚļĒÁĒ®ťöĒÁ¶Ľś†°ť™Ć

**šŅģśĒĻÁāĻ**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/controller/AssetController.java`

```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/assets")
public class AssetController {
    private final AssetService assetService;

    // śČÄśúČśü•ŤĮĘśé•ŚŹ£ŚľļŚą∂Śä†Áßüśą∑ś†°ť™Ćś≥®Ťß£
    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    @RequiresTenantCheck  // ŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™ÁāĻ
    public ResponseEntity<AssetResponse> getAssetById(@PathVariable Long id) {
        String tenantId = TenantContext.getTenantId(); // šĽéšłäšłčśĖáŚģČŚÖ®Ťé∑ŚŹĖÔľĆťĚě RequestParam
        return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.findByIdWithTenant(id, tenantId));
    }

    @GetMapping("/list")
    @RequiresTenantCheck
    public List<AssetResponse> listAssets() {
        String tenantId = TenantContext.getTenantId();
        return assetService.findAllByTenant(tenantId);
    }
}
```

### 4.6 `AssetRepository` ŚľļŚą∂Áßüśą∑ŤŅáśĽ§śü•ŤĮĘ (ťė≤śłóťÄŹś†łŚŅÉ)

**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/repository/AssetRepository.java`

```java
public interface AssetRepository extends JpaRepository<Asset, Long> {
    // ŚŅÖť°ĽšĹŅÁĒ®ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘÔľĆšł•Á¶ĀŤ£łśčľśé• SQL
    @Query("SELECT a FROM Asset a WHERE a.id = :id AND a.tenantId = :tenantId")
    Optional<Asset> findByIdAndTenantId(@Param("id") Long id, @Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

    @Query("SELECT a FROM Asset a WHERE a.tenantId = :tenantId ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC")
    List<Asset> findAllByTenantId(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId, Pageable pageable);
}
```

| šĹŅÁĒ® Tenant A ÁöĄ JWT Token ŤĮ∑śĪā `/api/assets/{id}` (ŚĪěšļé Tenant A) | ŤŅĒŚõě HTTP 200ÔľĆŚĆÖŚźęś≠£Á°ģŤĶĄšļßśēįśćģ | `expect(response.status()).toBe(200)` |
| śü•ÁúčśēįśćģŚļďśü•ŤĮĘśó•ŚŅó | SQL ŚĆÖŚźę `WHERE tenant_id = 'TENANT_A'` | ś£Äśü• Hibernate SQL Log |

### ATB-2: Ť∑®Áßüśą∑Ť∂äśĚÉŤģŅťóģśč¶śą™ť™ĆŤĮĀ (ś†łŚŅÉŚģČŚÖ®ÁāĻ)
**ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮē**: Playwright / API Test
| śĶčŤĮēś≠•ť™§ | śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěú | ť™ĆŤĮĀśČčśģĶ |
|-----------|----------|----------|
| šĹŅÁĒ® Tenant A ÁöĄ JWT Token ŤĮ∑śĪā `/api/assets/{id}` (**ŚĪěšļé Tenant B**) | ŤŅĒŚõě HTTP 403 ForbiddenÔľĆťĒôŤĮĮšŅ°śĀĮŚĆÖŚźę "Ť∑®Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģŤĘęśč¶śą™" | `expect(response.status()).toBe(403)` |
| śü•ÁúčśēįśćģŚļďśü•ŤĮĘÁĽďśěú | śü•ŤĮĘŚļĒŤŅĒŚõěÁ©ļśąĖŚú®ŚąáťĚĘŚĪāÁõīśé•šł≠śĖ≠ | SQL Log ŚļĒśėĺÁ§ļŚł¶ tenant_id ÁöĄŤŅáśĽ§ŤĮ≠ŚŹ• |

### ATB-3: śó† Token / šľ™ťÄ† Token ŤģŅťóģť™ĆŤĮĀ
**ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮē**: Playwright / API Test
| śĶčŤĮēś≠•ť™§ | śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěú | ť™ĆŤĮĀśČčśģĶ |
|-----------|----------|----------|
| šłćśźļŚł¶ Authorization Header ŤĮ∑śĪāśé•ŚŹ£ | ŤŅĒŚõě HTTP 401 Unauthorized | `expect(response.status()).toBe(401)` |
| šĹŅÁĒ®šľ™ťÄ†ÁöĄ tenant_id claim ÁöĄ Token | JWT Ťß£śěźŚ§ĪŤī•ÔľĆŤŅĒŚõě 401 śąĖŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™ | `expect(response.status()).toBe(401/403)` |

### ATB-4: SQL ś≥®ŚÖ•śłóťÄŹśĶčŤĮē (Áßüśą∑ÁĽīŚļ¶)
**ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮē**: pytest / sqlmap ś®°śčü

|-----------|----------|----------|
| Śú® tenant_id šłäšłčśĖášł≠śěĄťÄ† `' OR '1'='1` Á≠Č Payload | ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘŚįÜŚÖ∂ŤßÜšłļśôģťÄöŚ≠óÁ¨¶šł≤ÔľĆśó†ś≥®ŚÖ•śēąśěú | śēįśćģŚļďśó•ŚŅóśėĺÁ§ļŚŹāśēįŚ∑≤ŤĹ¨šĻČ |

## ťúÄśĪāšłéŤÉĆśôĮ
Á≥ĽÁĽüŚŅÖť°ĽŚģěÁéįÁČ©ÁźÜÁļßŚ§öÁßüśą∑śēįśćģťöĒÁ¶Ľ„ÄāśĒĽŚáĽŤÄÖŚŹĮŤÉĹťÄöŤŅášľ™ťÄ† Token„ÄĀÁĮ°śĒĻŤĮ∑śĪāŚŹāśēįśąĖŚą©ÁĒ® SQL ś≥®ŚÖ•ŚįĚŤĮēŤ∑®Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģŤĶĄšļßśēįśćģ„Äāśú¨ŤßĄś†ľŤ¶ĀśĪāŚú® **Ťģ§ŤĮĀŤŅáśĽ§ŚĪā**„ÄĀ**šłäšłčśĖášľ†ťÄíŚĪā**„ÄĀ**ŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™ŚĪā** ŚíĆ **śĆĀšĻÖŚĪāśü•ŤĮĘ** Śõõšł™ÁĽīŚļ¶śěĄŚĽļťó≠ÁéĮťė≤Śĺ°šĹďÁ≥ĽÔľĆÁ°ģšŅĚ `tenant_id` ÁöĄŤé∑ŚŹĖŤ∑ĮŚĺĄŚĒĮšłÄšłĒšłćŚŹĮÁĮ°śĒĻÔľĆśēįśćģŚļďśü•ŤĮĘŚŅÖť°ĽŚľļŚą∂ÁĽĎŚģöÁßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜ„Äā

## ŤĺĻÁēĆÁļ¶śĚü

### śäÄśúĮś†ąšłéŤĆÉŚõī
- **ŤĮ≠Ť®Ä**: Java 17+ / Spring Boot 3.x
- **śĆĀšĻÖŚĪā**: Spring Data JPA (Hibernate)
- **ŚģČŚÖ®ś°Üśě∂**: Spring Security + JWT
- **šŅģśĒĻŤĆÉŚõī**: `JwtAuthenticationFilter` ‚Üí `TenantContextHolder` (śĖįŚĽļ) ‚Üí `AssetController` ‚Üí `AssetService` ‚Üí `AssetRepository`

### ŚģČŚÖ®ÁļĘÁļŅ
1. **Á¶Āś≠Ę** šĽé HTTP Request Áõīśé•ŤĮĽŚŹĖ `tenantId` ŚŹāśēįÔľąťė≤ś≠ĘŚŹāśēįÁĮ°śĒĻśĒĽŚáĽÔľČ
2. **ŚŅÖť°Ľ** šĽéŤß£ŚĮÜŚźéÁöĄ JWT Claims šł≠śŹźŚŹĖÁßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜÔľĆŚĻ∂Ś≠ėŚā®Śú® ThreadLocal šłäšłčśĖášł≠
3. **šł•Á¶Ā** šĹŅÁĒ®Ś≠óÁ¨¶šł≤śčľśé•śěĄŚĽļ SQL śü•ŤĮĘÔľĆŚŅÖť°ĽšĹŅÁĒ® JPA ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘśąĖ Criteria API
4. **ŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™** ŚŅÖť°ĽŤ¶ÜÁõĖśČÄśúČ `AssetController` ÁöĄŤĮĽŚÜôśé•ŚŹ£ÔľĆśó†šĺčŚ§Ė

---

## ŚľÄŚŹĎŚąáŚÖ•ŚĪāÁļßŚļŹŚąó

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[JwtAuthenticationFilter] --Ťß£śěźTokenśŹźŚŹĖtenant_id--> B[TenantContextHolder]
    B --ThreadLocalŚ≠ėŚā®--> C{ŤĮ∑śĪāšłäšłčśĖá}
    C --ś≥®ŚÖ•ŚąįśúćŚä°ŚĪā--> D[AssetService]
    D --ŚľļŚą∂šľ†ŚŹāśü•ŤĮĘ--> E[AssetRepository]
    E --ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖSQLśČßŤ°Ć--> F[(Ś§öÁßüśą∑śēįśćģŚļď)]
    G[@RequiresTenantCheck ŚąáťĚĘ] --śč¶śą™ś†°ť™Ć--> C
```

## ŤĮ¶ÁĽÜŚģěÁéįŤßĄś†ľ

### Á¨¨šłÄťė∂śģĶÔľöÁßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáśĆĀśúČŤÄÖ (śĖįŚĽļ)
**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/context/TenantContextHolder.java`

```java
package com.ams.context;

import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import java.util.Optional;

/**
 * TenantContextHolder - Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáśĆĀśúČŤÄÖ (ThreadLocal)
 * ŚģČŚÖ®ÁļĘÁļŅÔľöÁ¶Āś≠ĘŚ§ĖťÉ®Áõīśé•ŤģĺÁĹģ tenantIdÔľĆšĽÖŚÖĀŤģłÁĒĪŤģ§ŤĮĀŤŅáśĽ§Śô®ŚÜôŚÖ•
 */
public class TenantContextHolder {
    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(TenantContextHolder.class);
    private static final ThreadLocal<String> CONTEXT = new ThreadLocal<>();

    // šĽÖšĺõ JwtAuthenticationFilter ŤįÉÁĒ®
    public static void setTenantId(String tenantId) {
        CONTEXT.set(tenantId);
    }

    public static String getTenantId() {
        return CONTEXT.get();
    }

    public static Optional<String> getTenantIdOptional() {
        return Optional.ofNullable(CONTEXT.get());
    }

    public static void clear() {
        CONTEXT.remove();
    }
}
```

---

### Á¨¨šļĆťė∂śģĶÔľöŤģ§ŤĮĀŤŅáśĽ§Śô®ŚĘěŚľļ (šŅģśĒĻ)
**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`  
**ŚŹėśõīÁāĻ**: Śú® Token ś†°ť™ĆťÄöŤŅáŚźéÔľĆŚįÜÁßüśą∑ ID ś≥®ŚÖ•šłäšłčśĖá„Äā

```java
// ... imports ...
import com.ams.context.TenantContextHolder;

public class JwtAuthenticationFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {
    private final JwtUtil jwtUtil;

    @Override
    protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain chain)
            throws ServletException, IOException {
        String token = extractToken(request);

        if (token != null && jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {
            // 1. šĽé Token Claims šł≠śŹźŚŹĖ tenant_idÔľĆŤÄĆťĚěšĽé Request ŚŹāśēįŤĮĽŚŹĖ
            String tenantId = jwtUtil.getTenantIdFromToken(token);
            
            if (tenantId == null || tenantId.isBlank()) {
                log.error("JWT token missing tenant_id claim");
                response.sendError(HttpServletResponse.SC_UNAUTHORIZED, "Invalid token: missing tenant context");
                return;
            }

            // 2. ŤģĺÁĹģŚąį ThreadLocal šłäšłčśĖáÔľĆšĺõŚźéÁĽ≠ŚĪāÁļßšĹŅÁĒ®
            TenantContextHolder.setTenantId(tenantId);
            log.debug("Tenant context set: {}", tenantId);

            // 3. śěĄŚĽļ Security Context (šŅĚśĆĀŚéüśúČťÄĽŤĺĎ)
            UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken auth = new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(
                    jwtUtil.getUsernameFromToken(token), null, Collections.emptyList());
            SecurityContextHolder.getContext().setAuthentication(auth);
        }

        try {
            chain.doFilter(request, response);
        } finally {
            // 4. „ÄźŚÖ≥ťĒģ„ÄĎŤĮ∑śĪāÁĽďśĚüŚŅÖť°ĽśłÖťô§šłäšłčśĖáÔľĆťė≤ś≠Ę ThreadLocal ŚÜÖŚ≠ėś≥ĄśľŹŚŹäÁßüśą∑šł≤ŚŹ∑
            TenantContextHolder.clear();
        }
    }
}
```

---

### Á¨¨šłČťė∂śģĶÔľöJWT Ś∑•ŚÖ∑ÁĪĽśČ©ŚĪē (šŅģśĒĻ)
**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/utils/JwtUtil.java`  
**ŚŹėśõīÁāĻ**: ŚĘěŚä†Áßüśą∑ ID ÁöĄśŹźŚŹĖšłéś≥®ŚÖ•śĖĻś≥ē„Äā

```java
public class JwtUtil {
    // ... ÁéįśúČŚłłťáŹŚģöšĻČ ...

    /**
     * šĽé Token šł≠ŚģČŚÖ®śŹźŚŹĖ tenant_id
     */
    public String getTenantIdFromToken(String token) {
        Claims claims = this.getClaimsFromToken(token);
        return (String) claims.get("tenant_id"); // ŚŅÖť°Ľšłé generateToken šł≠ÁöĄ key šłÄŤáī
    }

    /**
     * ÁĒüśąź Token śó∂ś≥®ŚÖ• tenant_id claim
     */
    public String createToken(String username, Long userId, String tenantId) {
        Map<String, Object> claims = new HashMap<>();
        claims.put("tenant_id", tenantId); // Áßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜŚŅÖť°ĽŚÜôŚÖ• Payload
        claims.put("user_id", userId);

        return Jwts.builder()
                .setClaims(claims)
                .setSubject(username)
                .setIssuedAt(new Date())
                .setExpiration(new Date(System.currentTimeMillis() + EXPIRATION))
                .signWith(this.getSigningKey(), SignatureAlgorithm.HS256)
                .compact();
    }

    // ... ÁéįśúČśĖĻś≥ēšŅĚśĆĀšłćŚŹė ...
}
```

---

### Á¨¨Śõõťė∂śģĶÔľöÁßüśą∑ťöĒÁ¶ĽŚąáťĚĘ (śĖįŚĽļ)
**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/aspect/TenantIsolationAspect.java`  
**ŚäüŤÉĹ**: ŚĮĻśČÄśúČ AssetController śĖĻś≥ēŤŅõŤ°ĆŚČćÁĹģś†°ť™ĆÔľĆÁ°ģšŅĚšłäšłčśĖáŚ≠ėŚú® tenantId„Äā

```java
package com.ams.aspect;

import com.ams.context.TenantContextHolder;
import org.aspectj.lang.annotation.*;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import java.util.Optional;

/**
 * TenantIsolationAspect - Áßüśą∑ťöĒÁ¶ĽŚąáťĚĘ
 * ŚģČŚÖ®ÁļĘÁļŅÔľöšĽĽšĹēŤŅõŚÖ• AssetController ÁöĄŤĮ∑śĪāŚŅÖť°ĽśĆĀśúČśúČśēąÁöĄ tenantId šłäšłčśĖá
 */
@Aspect
@Component
public class TenantIsolationAspect {

    @Before("execution(* com.ams.controller.AssetController.*(..))")
    public void validateTenantContext() throws Exception {
        Optional<String> tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantIdOptional();
        if (tenantId.isEmpty()) {
            throw new SecurityException("Multi-tenancy violation: No tenant context found in security context.");
        }
    }

    @AfterReturning(pointcut = "execution(* com.ams.controller.AssetController.*(..))", returning = "result")
    public void logTenantAccess(Object result) {
        String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();
        // Śģ°Ťģ°śó•ŚŅóÔľöŤģįŚĹēŚď™šł™Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģšļÜŤĶĄśļź (ÁĒüšļßÁéĮŚĘÉŚļĒŤĺďŚáļŚąį audit_log Ť°®)
        System.out.println("[TENANT-AUDIT] Access by tenant: " + tenantId);
    }
}
```

---

### Á¨¨šļĒťė∂śģĶÔľöAssetController šłé Service ŚĪāťöĒÁ¶Ľśü•ŤĮĘŚģěÁéį

#### 5.1 AssetRepository (ŚľļŚą∂ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘ)
**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/repository/AssetRepository.java`

```java
package com.ams.repository;

import com.ams.model.Asset;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Query;
import org.springframework.data.repository.query.Param;
import java.util.*;

public interface AssetRepository extends JpaRepository<Asset, Long> {

    /**
     * „ÄźŚģČŚÖ®ÁļĘÁļŅ„ÄĎśČÄśúČśü•ŤĮĘŚŅÖť°ĽŚľļŚą∂śźļŚł¶ tenant_id ŚŹāśēį
     * šł•Á¶ĀśČßŤ°Ć SELECT * FROM assets (ŚÖ®Ť°®śČęśŹŹ)
     */
    @Query("SELECT a FROM Asset a WHERE a.tenantId = :tenantId")
    List<Asset> findAllByTenant(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

    @Query("SELECT a FROM Asset a WHERE a.id = :id AND a.tenantId = :tenantId")
    Optional<Asset> findByIdAndTenant(@Param("id") Long id, @Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

    @Query("SELECT COUNT(a) FROM Asset a WHERE a.tenantId = :tenantId")
    long countByTenant(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);
}
```

#### 5.2 AssetService (šĽéšłäšłčśĖáŚŹĖÁĒ®Áßüśą∑ ID)
**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/service/AssetService.java`

```java
package com.ams.service;

import com.ams.context.TenantContextHolder;
import com.ams.model.Asset;
import com.ams.repository.AssetRepository;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import java.util.*;

@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class AssetService {
    private final AssetRepository assetRepository;

    /**
     * Ťé∑ŚŹĖŚĹďŚČćÁßüśą∑ÁöĄśČÄśúČŤĶĄšļß - ŚľļŚą∂šĽéšłäšłčśĖáŤĮĽŚŹĖ tenantId
     */
    public List<Asset> getAllAssets() {
        String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId(); // ÁĒĪŚąáťĚĘšŅĚŤĮĀťĚěÁ©ļ
        return assetRepository.findAllByTenant(tenantId);
    }

    /**
     * ś†ĻśćģIDŤé∑ŚŹĖŚćēšł™ŤĶĄšļß - ŚŅÖť°Ľś†°ť™ĆÁßüśą∑ŚĹíŚĪěśĚÉ
     */
    public Asset getAssetById(Long id) {
        String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();
        return assetRepository.findByIdAndTenant(id, tenantId)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException("Asset not found or access denied for tenant: " + tenantId));
    }

    /**
     * ŚąõŚĽļŤĶĄšļß - ŚľļŚą∂ÁĽĎŚģöŚĹďŚČćÁßüśą∑
     */
    public Asset createAsset(Asset asset) {
        String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();
        asset.setTenantId(tenantId); // ŚľļŚą∂Ť¶ÜÁõĖÔľĆťė≤ś≠ĘŚČćÁęĮšľ™ťÄ† tenant_id
        return assetRepository.save(asset);
    }

    /**
     * Śą†ťô§ŤĶĄšļß - ŚŅÖť°Ľś†°ť™ĆÁßüśą∑ŚĹíŚĪěśĚÉ
     */
    public void deleteAsset(Long id) {
        String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();
        Asset asset = getAssetById(id); // ŚÜÖťÉ®Ś∑≤ŚģĆśąźÁßüśą∑ś†°ť™Ć
        assetRepository.delete(asset);
    }

    /**
     * śõīśĖįŤĶĄšļß - ŚŅÖť°Ľś†°ť™ĆÁßüśą∑ŚĹíŚĪěśĚÉŚĻ∂ŚľļŚą∂ŤģĺÁĹģÁßüśą∑Ś≠óśģĶ
     */
    public Asset updateAsset(Long id, Asset updatedAsset) {
        String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();
        Asset existing = getAssetById(id); // ŚÜÖťÉ®Ś∑≤ŚģĆśąźÁßüśą∑ś†°ť™Ć
        
        // śõīśĖįšłöŚä°Ś≠óśģĶÔľĆŚľļŚą∂šŅĚÁēôŚéüÁßüśą∑ID
        existing.setName(updatedAsset.getName());
        existing.setType(updatedAsset.getType());
        existing.setCategory(updatedAsset.getCategory());
        existing.setStatus(updatedAsset.getStatus());
        existing.setTenantId(tenantId); // ŚÜćś¨°ŚľļŚą∂ŤģĺÁĹģÔľĆťė≤ś≠ĘŤ∂äśĚÉšŅģśĒĻÁßüśą∑ŚĹíŚĪě
        
        return assetRepository.save(existing);
    }
}
```

#### 5.3 AssetController (šŅĚśĆĀÁģÄśīĀÔľĆťÄĽŤĺĎšłčś≤ČŚąį Service)
**śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/controller/AssetController.java`

```java
package com.ams.controller;

import com.ams.model.Asset;
import com.ams.service.AssetService;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
import java.util.*;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/assets")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class AssetController {
    private final AssetService assetService;

    /**
     * Ťé∑ŚŹĖśČÄśúČŤĶĄšļß - Áßüśą∑ťöĒÁ¶ĽÁĒĪ Service + ŚąáťĚĘšŅĚŤĮĀ
     */
    @GetMapping
    public ResponseEntity<List<Asset>> getAll() {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.getAllAssets());
    }

    /**
     * ś†ĻśćģIDŤé∑ŚŹĖŚćēšł™ŤĶĄšļß
     */
    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    public ResponseEntity<Asset> getById(@PathVariable Long id) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.getAssetById(id));
    }

    /**
     * ŚąõŚĽļśĖįŤĶĄšļß - tenantId ŚľļŚą∂šĽé JWT šłäšłčśĖáś≥®ŚÖ•ÔľĆŚČćÁęĮšłćŚŹĮšľ™ťÄ†
     */
    @PostMapping
    public ResponseEntity<Asset> create(@RequestBody Asset asset) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.createAsset(asset));
    }

    /**
     * śõīśĖįŤĶĄšļß
     */
    @PutMapping("/{id}")
    public ResponseEntity<Asset> update(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody Asset asset) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.updateAsset(id, asset));
    }

    /**
     * Śą†ťô§ŤĶĄšļß
     */
    @DeleteMapping("/{id}")
    public ResponseEntity<Void> delete(@PathVariable Long id) {
        assetService.deleteAsset(id);
        return ResponseEntity.noContent().build();
    }
}
```

---

## ť™ĆśĒ∂śĶčŤĮēŚüļŚáÜ (ATB)

### ATB-01: Áßüśą∑ťöĒÁ¶ĽŚäüŤÉĹť™ĆŤĮĀ (ś≠£ŚłłŤ∑ĮŚĺĄ)
| śĶčŤĮēś≠•ť™§ | śďćšĹúśŹŹŤŅį | ťĘĄśúüÁĽďśěú | ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻŚľŹ |
|----------|----------|-----------|---------------|
| 1. Ťé∑ŚŹĖ Token A | šĹŅÁĒ® Tenant_A ÁöĄŚá≠śćģÁôĽŚĹēÔľĆŤé∑ŚŹĖ JWT | ŤŅĒŚõěŚĆÖŚźę `tenantId=T001` ÁöĄ Token | Playwright: ś®°śčüÁôĽŚĹēŚĻ∂śą™Ťé∑ Response Header |
| 2. śü•ŤĮĘŤĶĄšļß A | šĹŅÁĒ® Token A ŤįÉÁĒ® `/api/assets` | šĽÖŤŅĒŚõěŚĪěšļé T001 ÁöĄŤĶĄšļßŚąóŤ°® | Playwright: API ŤĮ∑śĪāś†°ť™Ć JSON ŚÜÖŚģĻ |
| 3. Ťé∑ŚŹĖ Token B | šĹŅÁĒ® Tenant_B ÁöĄŚá≠śćģÁôĽŚĹēÔľĆŤé∑ŚŹĖ JWT | ŤŅĒŚõěŚĆÖŚźę `tenantId=T002` ÁöĄ Token | ŚźĆšłä |
| 4. śü•ŤĮĘŤĶĄšļß B | šĹŅÁĒ® Token B ŤįÉÁĒ® `/api/assets` | šĽÖŤŅĒŚõěŚĪěšļé T002 ÁöĄŤĶĄšļßŚąóŤ°®ÔľĆšłćŚŹĮŤßĀ T001 śēįśćģ | Playwright: ŚĮĻśĮĒšł§ś¨°ŤĮ∑śĪāÁĽďśěúťõÜšłćÁõłšļ§ |

### ATB-02: Ť∑®Áßüśą∑Ť∂äśĚÉŤģŅťóģśč¶śą™ (ŚģČŚÖ®ÁļĘÁļŅ)
| śĶčŤĮēś≠•ť™§ | śďćšĹúśŹŹŤŅį | ťĘĄśúüÁĽďśěú | ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻŚľŹ |
|----------|----------|-----------|---------------|
| 1. Ťé∑ŚŹĖ Token A | šĹŅÁĒ® Tenant_A ÁöĄŚá≠śćģÁôĽŚĹēÔľĆŤé∑ŚŹĖ JWT (`tenantId=T001`) | ŤŅĒŚõěśúČśēą Token | Playwright: ś®°śčüÁôĽŚĹē |
| 2. Ťé∑ŚŹĖÁßüśą∑ B ÁöĄŤĶĄšļß ID | ťÄöŤŅáŚźąś≥ēśČčśģĶśąĖŚ∑≤Áü•śĖĻŚľŹŤé∑ŚŹĖŚĪěšļé T002 ÁöĄŤĶĄšļß ID (Ś¶ā `id=999`) | - | - |
| 3. Ť∂äśĚÉśü•ŤĮĘŚćēśĚ°ŤģįŚĹē | šĹŅÁĒ® Token A ŤįÉÁĒ® `/api/assets/999` | ŤŅĒŚõě **404 Not Found** śąĖŤá™ŚģöšĻČťĒôŤĮĮÔľĆšłćś≥Ąťú≤śēįśćģ | Playwright: ś†°ť™Ć Response Status šłļ 404 |
| 4. Ť∂äśĚÉśõīśĖįŤĶĄšļß | šĹŅÁĒ® Token A ŚŹĎťÄĀ PUT ŤĮ∑śĪāŚąį `/api/assets/999` šŅģśĒĻ T002 ÁöĄŤĶĄšļß | ŤŅĒŚõě **404 Not Found** śąĖ **403 Forbidden**ÔľĆśēįśćģśú™ŚŹėśõī | Playwright: ś†°ť™Ć Status ŚŹäśēįśćģŚļďÁä∂śÄĀšłćŚŹė |
| 5. Ť∂äśĚÉŚą†ťô§ŤĶĄšļß | šĹŅÁĒ® Token A ŚŹĎťÄĀ DELETE ŤĮ∑śĪāŚąį `/api/assets/999` | ŤŅĒŚõě **404 Not Found**ÔľĆŤĶĄšļßśú™ŤĘęŚą†ťô§ | Playwright: ś†°ť™Ć Response + ťöŹŚźéÁĒ® Token B śü•ŤĮĘÁ°ģŤģ§Ś≠ėŚú® |

### ATB-03: śó†Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáśč¶śą™ť™ĆŤĮĀ (ŚąáťĚĘÁĒüśēą)
| śĶčŤĮēś≠•ť™§ | śďćšĹúśŹŹŤŅį | ťĘĄśúüÁĽďśěú | ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻŚľŹ |
|----------|----------|-----------|-----------|
| 1. śěĄťÄ†śó†śēąŤĮ∑śĪā | šłćśźļŚł¶ Authorization Header śąĖśźļŚł¶šľ™ťÄ† Token ŤįÉÁĒ® `/api/assets` | ŤŅĒŚõě **401 Unauthorized** (Filterśč¶śą™) śąĖ **500** (ŚąáťĚĘśäõŚáļ SecurityExceptionÔľĆśúÄÁĽąÁĒĪŚÖ®ŚĪÄŚ§ĄÁźÜŚô®ŤĹ¨šłļ 403/500) | Playwright: Áõīśé•ŤįÉÁĒ® API ś†°ť™Ć Status Code |

- [ ] `AssetRepository` šł≠Á¶Āś≠ĘŚáļÁéįšłćŚł¶ `tenantId` ÁöĄ `findAll()` śąĖ `findById()`

- [ ] ŚąáťĚĘ/śč¶śą™Śô®śäõŚáļÁöĄ `SecurityException` ŚŅÖť°ĽÁĒĪŚÖ®ŚĪÄŚľāŚłłŚ§ĄÁźÜŚô®ŤĹ¨śćĘšłļś†áŚáÜ HTTP Áä∂śÄĀÁ†Ā (403 śąĖ 500)

## ťúÄśĪāšłéŤÉĆśôĮ

**ś†łŚŅÉÁõģś†á**ÔľöŚú® `AssetController` ŚŹäÁõłŚÖ≥śúćŚä°ŚĪāŚģěÁéįŚľļÁßüśą∑ťöĒÁ¶ĽśúļŚą∂ÔľĆÁ°ģšŅĚšĽĽšĹēŤĮ∑śĪāŚŅÖť°ĽśźļŚł¶Śźąś≥ē `tenant_id` Śá≠ŤĮĀÔľĆšłĒśēįśćģŤģŅťóģŤĘęÁČ©ÁźÜťôźŚą∂Śú®ŚĹďŚČćÁßüśą∑šĹúÁĒ®ŚüüŚÜÖ„Äā

**ŚģČŚÖ®ÁļĘÁļŅŤ¶ĀśĪā**Ôľö
1. **Á¶Āś≠ĘŤ£łśčľśé• SQL** ‚ÄĒ śČÄśúČśēįśćģŚļďśü•ŤĮĘŚŅÖť°ĽťÄöŤŅáŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśĖĻŚľŹŚľļŚą∂ś≥®ŚÖ• `tenant_id` ŤįďŤĮć„Äā
2. **Á¶Āś≠ĘŚģĘśą∑ÁęĮšľ†ťÄí tenant_id** ‚ÄĒ Áßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜŚŅÖť°ĽšĽéśúćŚä°ÁęĮŤß£śěźÁöĄ JWT Context šł≠śŹźŚŹĖÔľĆŚČćÁęĮšľ†ŚÖ•ÁöĄšĽĽšĹēÁßüśą∑Ś≠óśģĶŚú®ŚÜôŚÖ•ŚČćŤĘęŚľļŚą∂Ť¶ÜÁõĖśąĖšłĘŚľÉ„Äā
3. **ŚÖ®ťďĺŤ∑Įśč¶śą™** ‚ÄĒ šĽé Filter ŚĪā (Token Ťß£śěź) ‚Üí Service ŚĪā (šłäšłčśĖáś≥®ŚÖ•) ‚Üí Repository ŚĪā (śü•ŤĮĘŤįďŤĮć)ÔľĆśěĄŚĽļťó≠ÁéĮťöĒÁ¶ĽťďĺśĚ°„Äā

## ŤĺĻÁēĆÁļ¶śĚü

| ÁĽīŚļ¶ | Áļ¶śĚüśĚ°šĽ∂ | ŤŅĚŤßĄŚźéśěú |
|------|----------|-----------|
| **śēįśćģŤģŅťóģ** | śČÄśúČ SQL śü•ŤĮĘŚŅÖť°ĽŚĆÖŚźę `WHERE tenant_id = ?` | Áõīśé•śčíÁĽĚÁľĖŤĮĎ/ťÉ®ÁĹ≤ÔľĆŤßÜšłļšł•ťáćśľŹśīě |
| **Áßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜśĚ•śļź** | šĽÖŚÖĀŤģłšĽéŤß£śěźŚźéÁöĄ JWT Claims šł≠śŹźŚŹĖÔľĆÁ¶Āś≠Ęśé•śĒ∂ Request Body šł≠ÁöĄ tenantId | Service ŚĪāŚľļŚą∂Ť¶ÜÁõĖ DTO šł≠ÁöĄ tenantId Ś≠óśģĶ |
| **Ť∑®Áßüśą∑śďćšĹú** | šĽĽšĹēŤĮēŚõĺŤģŅťóģťĚěśú¨Áßüśą∑ ID ÁöĄŤģįŚĹēŚŅÖť°ĽŤŅĒŚõě 404 śąĖ 403 | Á¶Āś≠Ęś≥Ąťú≤ŤĶĄśļźŚ≠ėŚú®śÄßšŅ°śĀĮ (šłćŚĆļŚąÜ 403/404) |
| **SQL śěĄŚĽļśĖĻŚľŹ** | šĽÖŚÖĀŤģłšĹŅÁĒ® Spring Data JPA śĖĻś≥ēŚźćŤß£śěź„ÄĀ@Query ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśąĖ MyBatis XML ÁĽĎŚģö | ŚŹĎÁéįŚ≠óÁ¨¶šł≤śčľśé• SQL Áõīśé•śč¶śą™śěĄŚĽļśĶĀśįīÁļŅ |
| **ŚľāŚłłŚ§ĄÁźÜ** | ťöĒÁ¶Ľś†°ť™ĆŚ§ĪŤī•śäõŚáļŤá™ŚģöšĻČ `TenantIsolationException`ÔľĆÁĒĪŚÖ®ŚĪÄŚ§ĄÁźÜŚô®ŤĹ¨śćĘšłļś†áŚáÜ HTTP Code | Á¶Āś≠ĘŚú®ŚďćŚļĒšĹďšł≠śöīťú≤Áßüśą∑ ID śąĖśēįśćģŚļďÁĽďśěĄšŅ°śĀĮ |

## ť™ĆśĒ∂śĶčŤĮēŚüļŚáÜ (ATB)

### ATB-01: ś≠£ŚźĎÁßüśą∑śēįśćģŤģŅťóģť™ĆŤĮĀ
**ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: Playwright / API Test
```javascript
// ś®°śčüÁßüśą∑ A ÁöĄŚźąś≥ēŤĮ∑śĪā
const response = await api.get('/api/assets', {
  headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN_TENANT_A}` }
});

expect(response.status()).toBe(200);
// ť™ĆŤĮĀŤŅĒŚõěśēįśćģšł≠śČÄśúČŤģįŚĹēÁöĄ tenantId ŚĚáÁ≠Čšļé A ÁöĄ ID
const data = await response.json();
data.forEach(asset => expect(asset.tenantId).toBe('TENANT_A'));
```
**śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěú**: ŤŅĒŚõěÁä∂śÄĀÁ†Ā 200ÔľĆšłĒśēįśćģťõÜŤĘęÁČ©ÁźÜŤŅáśĽ§šłļšĽÖŚĆÖŚźęÁßüśą∑ A ÁöĄŤĶĄśļź„Äā

---

### ATB-02: Ť∑®Áßüśą∑Ť∂äśĚÉŤģŅťóģťėĽśĖ≠ (ID ťĀćŚéÜśĒĽŚáĽ)
**ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: Playwright / API Test
```javascript
// šĹŅÁĒ®Áßüśą∑ A ÁöĄ Token ŚįĚŤĮēÁõīśé•ŤĮ∑śĪāÁßüśą∑ B ÁöĄŤĶĄšļß ID
const ASSET_ID_BELONGS_TO_TENANT_B = 'asset-999';

const response = await api.get(`/api/assets/${ASSET_ID_BELONGS_TO_TENANT_B}`, {
  headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN_TENANT_A}` }
});

expect(response.status()).toBe(404); // ŚŅÖť°ĽŤŅĒŚõě 404ÔľĆšłćŚĆļŚąÜŤĶĄśļźśėĮŚź¶Ś≠ėŚú®šļéŚÖ∂šĽĖÁßüśą∑
```
**śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěú**: ŤŅĒŚõěÁä∂śÄĀÁ†Ā **404 Not Found** (Á¶Āś≠ĘŤŅĒŚõě 403 šĽ•ťė≤ś≠Ę ID śěöšłĺśéĘśĶč)„ÄāŚźéÁęĮśó•ŚŅóŚļĒŤģįŚĹēŤ∂äśĚÉŚįĚŤĮē„Äā

---

### ATB-03: Body šł≠šľ™ťÄ† tenantId ÁöĄŤ¶ÜÁõĖť™ĆŤĮĀ
**ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: Playwright / API Test
```javascript
// šĹŅÁĒ®Áßüśą∑ A ÁöĄ TokenÔľĆšĹÜŚú® Payload šł≠šľ™ťÄ†šłļÁßüśą∑ B
await api.post('/api/assets', {
  name: 'Rogue Asset',
  tenantId: 'TENANT_B' // śĀ∂śĄŹÁĮ°śĒĻ
}, { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN_TENANT_A}` }});

// śü•ŤĮĘŤĮ•ŤĶĄšļßÔľĆť™ĆŤĮĀŚÖ∂śČÄŚĪěÁßüśą∑śėĮŚź¶ŤĘęŚľļŚą∂šŅģś≠£šłļ A
const asset = await api.get('/api/assets/latest', {
  headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN_TENANT_A}` }
});
expect(asset.tenantId).toBe('TENANT_A'); // ŚŅÖť°ĽśėĮ AÔľĆšłćśėĮšľ™ťÄ†ÁöĄ B
```
**śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěú**: Service ŚĪāŚľļŚą∂ÁĒ® JWT šł≠ÁöĄÁßüśą∑ ID Ť¶ÜÁõĖ DTO ŚÄľ„ÄāśēįśćģŚļďšł≠ŤĮ•ŤĶĄšļßŤģįŚĹēśČÄŚĪěÁßüśą∑šłļ `TENANT_A`„Äā

### ATB-04: śó†śēą/ŤŅáśúü Token ÁöĄťöĒÁ¶Ľśč¶śą™ť™ĆŤĮĀ
**ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēśĖĻś≥ē**: Playwright / API Test

### ATB-05: SQL śó•ŚŅóŚģ°Ťģ°ť™ĆŤĮĀ (ŚźéÁęĮÁČ©ÁźÜś£Äśü•)

**śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěú**: śéßŚą∂ŚŹįŤĺďŚáļÁöĄ SQL ŚŅÖť°ĽŚĆÖŚźęÔľö

## šĽ£Á†ĀŚģěÁéįŤßĄś†ľŤ¶ĀśĪā

### Repository ŚĪāśĖĻś≥ēÁ≠ĺŚźćŤßĄŤĆÉ
śČÄśúČśü•ŤĮĘŚŅÖť°ĽśėĺŚľŹŚĆÖŚźę `tenantId` ŚŹāśēįÔľĆÁ¶Āś≠ĘšĺĚŤĶĖŚÖ®ŚĪÄťĽėŤģ§Ť°Ćšłļ„Äā
```java
// ‚ĚĆ šłćŚÖĀŤģłÔľöšĽÖŚá≠ ID śü•ŤĮĘÔľąŚŹĮŤÉĹŚĮľŤáīŤ∑®Áßüśą∑Ť∂äśĚÉÔľČ
Optional<Asset> findById(Long id);

// ‚úÖ ŚŅÖť°ĽÔľöŚľļŚą∂Ť¶ĀśĪā tenantId šĹúšłļŤįďŤĮćÁöĄšłÄťÉ®ŚąÜ
Optional<Asset> findByIdAndTenantId(Long id, String tenantId);
List<Asset> findAllByTenantId(String tenantId, Pageable pageable);
```

### Service ŚĪāšłäšłčśĖáŚŹĖŚÄľŤßĄŤĆÉ
Á¶Āś≠ĘšĽé Request Body śąĖ Query Param šł≠Áõīśé•šŅ°šĽĽ `tenantId`„ÄāŚŅÖť°ĽťÄöŤŅáŚģČŚÖ®šłäšłčśĖáŤé∑ŚŹĖ„Äā
```java
public class AssetService {
    // ŚĒĮšłÄŚŹĮšŅ°śĚ•śļźÔľöSecurityContextHolder (ÁĒĪ JwtAuthenticationFilter Ś°ęŚÖÖ)
    private String getCurrentTenantId() {
        return SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication(); // Ťé∑ŚŹĖÁßüśą∑ ID
    }

    @Transactional
    public void createAsset(AssetRequest request) {
        String tenantId = this.getCurrentTenantId();  // šĽéšłäšłčśĖáŚŹĖÔľĆšłćšĽé request ŚŹĖ
        request.setTenantId(tenantId);               // ŚľļŚą∂Ť¶ÜÁõĖ body šł≠ÁöĄšľ™ťÄ†ŚÄľ
        assetRepository.save(new AssetEntity(request));
    }

    public AssetResponse getAssetById(Long id) {
        String tenantId = this.getCurrentTenantId();
        return assetRepository.findByIdAndTenantId(id, tenantId)  // ŚľļŚą∂Śł¶Áßüśą∑ŤįďŤĮć
            .map(this::convertToResponse)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException("Asset not found")); // ÁĽüšłÄśäõŚáļÔľĆšłćŚĆļŚąÜŤ∂äśĚÉŤŅėśėĮšłćŚ≠ėŚú®
    }
}
```

### Controller ŚĪāśé•ŚŹ£ŚģöšĻČŤßĄŤĆÉ
ÁßĽťô§śČÄśúČśé•śĒ∂ `tenantId` šĹúšłļŤĺďŚÖ•ŚŹāśēįÁöĄ API ŤģĺŤģ°„ÄāÁßüśą∑ŤļęšĽĹÁĒĪ Token śČŅŤĹĹ„Äā
```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/assets")
public class AssetController {

    // ‚úÖ ś≠£Á°ģÔľöśó†ťúÄ tenantId ŚŹāśēįÔľĆÁĒĪ Service šĽéšłäšłčśĖáśŹźŚŹĖ
    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    public ResponseEntity<AssetResponse> getAsset(@PathVariable Long id) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.getAssetById(id));
    }

    // ‚ĚĆ Á¶Āś≠ĘÔľöŚÖĀŤģłŚČćÁęĮšľ†ŚÖ• tenantId
    // @GetMapping("/{id}")
    // public ResponseEntity<?> getAsset(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestParam String tenantId) { ... }
}
```

śĆášĽ§Ôľöšł•ś†ľśĆČÁÖßšłäśĖĻÁöĄś°Üśě∂ŤßĄŚąôÔľĆŚĻ∂Śú®ŚŅÖŤ¶Āśó∂Ťá™Śä®ś£ÄÁīĘśĖášĽ∂ŚģĆśąźÁľĖŤĺĎŚĻ∂śõīśĖį progress.md„Äā --yes --no-show-model-warnings --no-auto-commits --no-browser

#### ## 4. šĽ£Á†ĀŚģěÁéįŤßĄś†ľ (Code Specification)  
####   
#### ### 4.1 JwtUtil.java śČ©ŚĪē  
#### ```java  
#### // src/main/java/com/ams/utils/JwtUtil.java  
####   
#### public String getTenantIdFromToken(String token) {  
####     Claims claims = this.getClaimsFromToken(token);  
####     return (String) claims.get("tenant_id");  // ŚŅÖť°ĽšĽé JWT Claims šł≠śŹźŚŹĖÔľĆšłćŚŹĮšŅ°šĽĽŚģĘśą∑ÁęĮŤĺďŚÖ•  
#### }

#### ### 4.2 TenantContextHolder.java (śĖįŚĽļ)  
#### ```java  
#### // src/main/java/com/ams/security/TenantContextHolder.java  
####   
#### public class TenantContextHolder {  
####     private static final ThreadLocal<String> CONTEXT = new ThreadLocal<>();  
####   
####     public static void setTenantId(String tenantId) { CONTEXT.set(tenantId); }  
####     public static String getTenantId() { return CONTEXT.get(); }  
####     public static void clear() { CONTEXT.remove(); }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 4.3 JwtAuthenticationFilter.java šŅģśĒĻ  
#### ```java  
#### // src/main/java/com/ams/config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java  
####   
#### @Override  
#### protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain chain) {  
####     String token = extractToken(request);  
####     if (token != null && jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {  
####         String tenantId = jwtUtil.getTenantIdFromToken(token);  
####         TenantContextHolder.setTenantId(tenantId);  // ś≥®ŚÖ•Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖá  
####         // ... ŚéüśúČŤģ§ŤĮĀťÄĽŤĺĎ  
####     }  
####     try {  
####         chain.doFilter(request, response);  
####     } finally {  
####         TenantContextHolder.clear();  // ŚŅÖť°ĽśłÖÁźÜÔľĆťė≤ś≠ĘÁļŅÁ®čťáćÁĒ®ŚĮľŤáīśēįśćģśĪ°śüď  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 4.4 TenantIsolationAspect.java (śĖįŚĽļ)  
#### ```java  
#### @Aspect  
#### @Component  
#### public class TenantIsolationAspect {  
####     @Around("@annotation(com.ams.security.RequiresTenantCheck)")  
####     public Object validateTenantAccess(ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint) throws Throwable {  
####         String currentTenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();  
####         if (currentTenantId == null) throw new AccessDeniedException("Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáÁľļŚ§Ī");  
####   
####         // Ťé∑ŚŹĖŤĶĄśļźśČÄŚĪěÁßüśą∑Ôľąś†ĻśćģŚÖ∑šĹďšłöŚä°ťÄĽŤĺĎŤé∑ŚŹĖÔľČ  
####         Object result = joinPoint.proceed();  
####         if (result instanceof TenantAware resource && !resource.getTenantId().equals(currentTenantId)) {  
####             throw new AccessDeniedException("Ť∑®Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģŤĘęśč¶śą™ÔľöŤĶĄśļźšłćŚĪěšļéŚĹďŚČćÁßüśą∑");  
####         }  
####         return result;  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 4.5 AssetController.java ŚļĒÁĒ®  
#### ```java  
#### @RestController  
#### @RequestMapping("/api/assets")  
#### public class AssetController {  
####     @Autowired  
####     private AssetService assetService;  
####   
####     @GetMapping("/{id}")  
####     @RequiresTenantCheck  // ŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™ÁāĻ  
####     public ResponseEntity<Asset> getAsset(@PathVariable Long id) {  
####         String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();  
####         return ResponseEntity.ok(assetService.findByIdWithTenant(id, tenantId));  
####     }  
####   
####     @GetMapping("/list")  
####     @RequiresTenantCheck  
####     public List<Asset> listAssets() {  
####         // ś®°śčüŚ§öÁßüśą∑ťöĒÁ¶Ľśü•ŤĮĘÔľöŚŅÖť°ĽŚĆÖŚźę tenant_id śĚ°šĽ∂  
####         String tenantId = TenantContextHolder.getTenantId();  
####         return assetService.findAllByTenant(tenantId);  // ŚļēŚĪāšĹŅÁĒ®ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘ  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 4.6 AssetRepository/Service (ś®°śčüťöĒÁ¶Ľśü•ŤĮĘ)  
#### ```java  
#### public interface AssetRepository extends JpaRepository<Asset, Long> {  
####     @Query("SELECT a FROM Asset a WHERE a.id = :id AND a.tenantId = :tenantId")  
####     Optional<Asset> findByIdAndTenantId(@Param("id") Long id, @Param("tenantId") String tenantId);  
####   
####     @Query("SELECT a FROM Asset a WHERE a.tenantId = :tenantId")  
####     List<Asset> findAllByTenantId(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);  
#### }  
#### ```

#### ## 5. ť™ĆśĒ∂śĶčŤĮēŚüļŚáÜ (ATB)

#### ### 5.1 ŚäüŤÉĹť™ĆŤĮĀŤ∑ĮŚĺĄ  
####   
#### | śĶčŤĮēś≠•ť™§ | śďćšĹúśŹŹŤŅį | ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮēŚ∑•ŚÖ∑/śĖĻś≥ē | śúüŚĺÖÁĽďśěú |  
#### | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |  
#### | **T1: Token Ťß£śěź** | šĹŅÁĒ®ŚĆÖŚźę `tenant_id=T101` ÁöĄ JWT ŤįÉÁĒ®śé•ŚŹ£ | Playwright (śč¶śą™ŤĮ∑śĪā) | ŤĮ∑śĪāŚ§īśźļŚł¶ś≠£Á°ģ Bearer TokenÔľĆŚźéÁęĮŤß£śěźŚáļ T101 |  
#### | **T2: Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáś≥®ŚÖ•** | śü•Áúčśó•ŚŅóśąĖśČďśĖ≠ÁāĻÁ°ģŤģ§ Context ŚÄľ | IDE Debugger / Logback | `TenantContextHolder.getTenantId()` ŤŅĒŚõě "T101" |  
#### | **T3: Śźąś≥ēŤģŅťóģśĶčŤĮē** | šĹŅÁĒ® T101 ÁöĄ Token ŤĮ∑śĪāŚÖ∂Ťá™ŤļęŤĶĄšļßśēįśćģ | Playwright + API Call | ŚďćŚļĒ 200 OKÔľĆŤŅĒŚõěś≠£Á°ģÁßüśą∑śēįśćģ |  
#### | **T4: Ť∂äśĚÉśč¶śą™śĶčŤĮē (ŚÖ≥ťĒģ)** | šĹŅÁĒ® T101 ÁöĄ Token ŚįĚŤĮēŤĮ∑śĪā `tenant_id=T999` ÁöĄŤĶĄśļź ID | Playwright / Postman | ŚďćŚļĒ **403 Forbidden**ÔľĆŚąáťĚĘśäõŚáļ AccessDeniedException |  
#### | **T5: SQL ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖť™ĆŤĮĀ** | śü•ÁúčśČßŤ°ĆÁöĄśēįśćģŚļďśü•ŤĮĘŤĮ≠ŚŹ• | Hibernate SQL Log (show_sql=true) | śü•ŤĮĘŚŅÖť°ĽŚĆÖŚźę `WHERE tenant_id = ?`ÔľĆśó†śčľśé•ÁóēŤŅĻ |  
#### | **T6: šłäšłčśĖáśłÖÁźÜśĶčŤĮē** | ŤŅěÁĽ≠ŚŹĎťÄĀŚ§öšł™ŤĮ∑śĪāÔľĆŤßāŚĮüÁßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáśėĮŚź¶šł≤Ť°ĆśĪ°śüď | Playwright ŚĻ∂ŚŹĎŚéčŚäõśĶčŤĮē | śĮŹšł™ŚďćŚļĒšĽÖŚĆÖŚźęŚĹďŚČć Token śČÄŚĪěÁßüśą∑śēįśćģ |

#### graph TD

#### ## 4. ŚģěÁéįŤßĄś†ľŤĮ¶śÉÖ  
####   
#### ### 4.1 `JwtUtil` ŚĘěŚľļÔľöśŹźŚŹĖ tenant_id Claim  
####   
#### **šŅģśĒĻÁāĻ**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/utils/JwtUtil.java`

#### ```java  
#### /* śČ©ŚĪēŤß£śěźśĖĻś≥ē */  
#### public String getTenantIdFromToken(String token) {  
####     Claims claims = this.getClaimsFromToken(token);

#### ### 4.2 `JwtAuthenticationFilter` ŚĘěŚľļÔľöšłäšłčśĖáś≥®ŚÖ•  
####   
#### **šŅģśĒĻÁāĻ**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/config/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java`

#### ```java  
#### /* doFilterInternal śĖĻś≥ēšł≠ */  
#### String token = extractToken(request);  
#### if (token != null && jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {  
####     String tenantId = jwtUtil.getTenantIdFromToken(token);  
####     // ŚÖ≥ťĒģÔľöŚįÜÁßüśą∑IDś≥®ŚÖ•ŚģČŚÖ®šłäšłčśĖáÔľĆšĺõŚźéÁĽ≠ťďĺŤ∑ĮšĹŅÁĒ®  
####     SecurityContextHolder.getContext().setAuthentication(new TenantAwareAuthenticationToken(tenantId, ...));  
#### }

#### ### 4.3 śĖįŚĽļ `TenantContext` šłäšłčśĖáśĆĀśúČÁĪĽ  
####   
#### **śĖášĽ∂**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/security/TenantContext.java`  
####   
#### ```java  
#### public class TenantContext {  
####     private static final ThreadLocal<String> TENANT_ID = new ThreadLocal<>();  
####   
####     public static void setTenantId(String tenantId) { TENANT_ID.set(tenantId); }  
####     public static String getTenantId() { return TENANT_ID.get(); }  
####     public static void clear() { TENANT_ID.remove(); }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 4.4 śĖįŚĽļ `RequiresTenantCheck` ś≥®Ťß£šłéŚąáťĚĘ  
####   
#### **ś≥®Ťß£**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/security/RequiresTenantCheck.java`  
#### ```java  
#### @Target(ElementType.METHOD)  
#### @Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)  
#### public @interface RequiresTenantCheck { }  
#### ```  
####   
#### **ŚąáťĚĘŚģěÁéį**: `backend/src/main/java/com/ams/security/TenantIsolationAspect.java`  
#### ```java  
#### @Aspect  
#### @Component  
#### public class TenantIsolationAspect {  
####     @Around("@annotation(com.ams.security.RequiresTenantCheck)")  
####     public Object validateTenantAccess(ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint) throws Throwable {  
####         String currentTenantId = TenantContext.getTenantId();  
####         if (currentTenantId == null) throw new AccessDeniedException("Áßüśą∑šłäšłčśĖáÁľļŚ§ĪÔľĆŤĮ∑ś£Äśü•ÁôĽŚĹēÁä∂śÄĀ");  
####   
####         Object result = joinPoint.proceed();  
####         // Ś¶āśěúŤŅĒŚõěÁĽďśěúśėĮÁßüśą∑śĄüÁü•ŤĶĄśļźÔľĆś†°ť™ĆŚĹíŚĪěśĚÉ  
####         if (result instanceof TenantAware resource && !resource.getTenantId().equals(currentTenantId)) {  
####             throw new AccessDeniedException("Ť∑®Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģŤĘęśč¶śą™ÔľöŤĶĄśļźšłćŚĪěšļéŚĹďŚČćÁßüśą∑");  
####         }  
####         return result;  
####     }  
#### }  
#### ```  
####   
#### ### 4.5 `AssetController` ŚļĒÁĒ®ťöĒÁ¶Ľś†°ť™Ć  
####

#### @RestController  
#### @RequestMapping("/api/assets")  
#### public class AssetController {

####     // śČÄśúČśü•ŤĮĘśé•ŚŹ£ŚľļŚą∂Śä†Áßüśą∑ś†°ť™Ćś≥®Ťß£  
####     @GetMapping("/{id}")

####     public ResponseEntity<AssetResponse> getAssetById(@PathVariable Long id) {

#### ## 5. ť™ĆśĒ∂śĶčŤĮēŚüļŚáÜ (ATB)

#### ### ATB-1: Śźąś≥ēÁßüśą∑śēįśćģŤģŅťóģť™ĆŤĮĀ

#### | šĹŅÁĒ® Tenant A ÁöĄ JWT Token ŤĮ∑śĪā `/api/assets/{id}` (ŚĪěšļé Tenant A) | ŤŅĒŚõě HTTP 200ÔľĆŚĆÖŚźęś≠£Á°ģŤĶĄšļßśēįśćģ | `expect(response.status()).toBe(200)` |

#### ### ATB-2: Ť∑®Áßüśą∑Ť∂äśĚÉŤģŅťóģśč¶śą™ť™ĆŤĮĀ (ś†łŚŅÉŚģČŚÖ®ÁāĻ)

#### | šĹŅÁĒ® Tenant A ÁöĄ JWT Token ŤĮ∑śĪā `/api/assets/{id}` (**ŚĪěšļé Tenant B**) | ŤŅĒŚõě HTTP 403 ForbiddenÔľĆťĒôŤĮĮšŅ°śĀĮŚĆÖŚźę "Ť∑®Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģŤĘęśč¶śą™" | `expect(response.status()).toBe(403)` |

#### ### ATB-3: śó† Token / šľ™ťÄ† Token ŤģŅťóģť™ĆŤĮĀ  
#### **ÁČ©ÁźÜśĶčŤĮē**: Playwright / API Test

####   
#### ### ATB-4: SQL ś≥®ŚÖ•śłóťÄŹśĶčŤĮē (Áßüśą∑ÁĽīŚļ¶)

#### | Śú® tenant_id šłäšłčśĖášł≠śěĄťÄ† `' OR '1'='1` Á≠Č Payload | ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘŚįÜŚÖ∂ŤßÜšłļśôģťÄöŚ≠óÁ¨¶šł≤ÔľĆśó†ś≥®ŚÖ•śēąśěú | śēįśćģŚļďśó•ŚŅóśėĺÁ§ļŚŹāśēįŚ∑≤ŤĹ¨šĻČ |

#### **ŤßĄś†ľÁČąśú¨**: `SPEC-2026-V1.3`    
#### **Áä∂śÄĀ**: ŚĺÖŚģěśĖĹ (Implementation Pending)

####   
#### ## ťúÄśĪāšłéŤÉĆśôĮ  
#### Á≥ĽÁĽüŚŅÖť°ĽŚģěÁéįÁČ©ÁźÜÁļßŚ§öÁßüśą∑śēįśćģťöĒÁ¶Ľ„ÄāśĒĽŚáĽŤÄÖŚŹĮŤÉĹťÄöŤŅášľ™ťÄ† Token„ÄĀÁĮ°śĒĻŤĮ∑śĪāŚŹāśēįśąĖŚą©ÁĒ® SQL ś≥®ŚÖ•ŚįĚŤĮēŤ∑®Áßüśą∑ŤģŅťóģŤĶĄšļßśēįśćģ„Äāśú¨ŤßĄś†ľŤ¶ĀśĪāŚú® **Ťģ§ŤĮĀŤŅáśĽ§ŚĪā**„ÄĀ**šłäšłčśĖášľ†ťÄíŚĪā**„ÄĀ**ŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™ŚĪā** ŚíĆ **śĆĀšĻÖŚĪāśü•ŤĮĘ** Śõõšł™ÁĽīŚļ¶śěĄŚĽļťó≠ÁéĮťė≤Śĺ°šĹďÁ≥ĽÔľĆÁ°ģšŅĚ `tenant_id` ÁöĄŤé∑ŚŹĖŤ∑ĮŚĺĄŚĒĮšłÄšłĒšłćŚŹĮÁĮ°śĒĻÔľĆśēįśćģŚļďśü•ŤĮĘŚŅÖť°ĽŚľļŚą∂ÁĽĎŚģöÁßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜ„Äā

####   
#### ## ŤĺĻÁēĆÁļ¶śĚü  
####   
#### ### śäÄśúĮś†ąšłéŤĆÉŚõī  
#### - **ŤĮ≠Ť®Ä**: Java 17+ / Spring Boot 3.x  
#### - **śĆĀšĻÖŚĪā**: Spring Data JPA (Hibernate)  
#### - **ŚģČŚÖ®ś°Üśě∂**: Spring Security + JWT  
#### - **šŅģśĒĻŤĆÉŚõī**: `JwtAuthenticationFilter` ‚Üí `TenantContextHolder` (śĖįŚĽļ) ‚Üí `AssetController` ‚Üí `AssetService` ‚Üí `AssetRepository`  
####   
#### ### ŚģČŚÖ®ÁļĘÁļŅ  
#### 1. **Á¶Āś≠Ę** šĽé HTTP Request Áõīśé•ŤĮĽŚŹĖ `tenantId` ŚŹāśēįÔľąťė≤ś≠ĘŚŹāśēįÁĮ°śĒĻśĒĽŚáĽÔľČ  
#### 2. **ŚŅÖť°Ľ** šĽéŤß£ŚĮÜŚźéÁöĄ JWT Claims šł≠śŹźŚŹĖÁßüśą∑ś†áŤĮÜÔľĆŚĻ∂Ś≠ėŚā®Śú® ThreadLocal šłäšłčśĖášł≠  
#### 3. **šł•Á¶Ā** šĹŅÁĒ®Ś≠óÁ¨¶šł≤śčľśé•śěĄŚĽļ SQL śü•ŤĮĘÔľĆŚŅÖť°ĽšĹŅÁĒ® JPA ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖśü•ŤĮĘśąĖ Criteria API  
#### 4. **ŚąáťĚĘśč¶śą™** ŚŅÖť°ĽŤ¶ÜÁõĖśČÄśúČ `AssetController` ÁöĄŤĮĽŚÜôśé•ŚŹ£ÔľĆśó†šĺčŚ§Ė

####   
#### ## ŚľÄŚŹĎŚąáŚÖ•ŚĪāÁļßŚļŹŚąó  
####   
#### ```mermaid  
#### graph TD  
####     A[JwtAuthenticationFilter] --Ťß£śěźTokenśŹźŚŹĖtenant_id--> B[TenantContextHolder]  
####     B --ThreadLocalŚ≠ėŚā®--> C{ŤĮ∑śĪāšłäšłčśĖá}  
####     C --ś≥®ŚÖ•ŚąįśúćŚä°ŚĪā--> D[AssetService]  
####     D --ŚľļŚą∂šľ†ŚŹāśü•ŤĮĘ--> E[AssetRepository]  
####     E --ŚŹāśēįŚĆĖSQLśČßŤ°Ć--> F[(Ś§öÁßüśą∑śēįśćģŚļď)]  
####     G[@RequiresTenantCheck ŚąáťĚĘ] --śč¶śą™ś†°ť™Ć--> C  
#### ```
